translation_en: These two types of exercise combined can result in mutual benefits, separated they will surely lead to mutual harm.
translation_zh: 这两种运动结合起来可以带来互惠，分开就会导致互害。(两败俱伤)

sentence: 他做事的时候非常专心，好象两豆塞耳，什么都听不见
translation_en: He is very focused when working, as if he has two peas in his ears, unable to hear anything.
translation_zh: 他在工作时非常专注，就好像有两个豆子塞在耳朵里一样，听不到任何声音。(两豆塞耳)

sentence: 为朋友两肋插刀，不算什么
translation_en: Stabbing someone in the back for a friend isn't much of a thing.
translation_zh: 与朋友背叛人，实在是不值得一提的事。（两肋插刀）

sentence: 土霸打倒，穷苦人见青天。不是两全其美
translation_en: Overthrowing the tyrant brings joy to the poor, but it's not a perfect world.
translation_zh: 两全其美，但世界并非完美。(Two extremes meet in perfection, but the world is not perfect.)

sentence: 这下子可不得了啦！真好像烈火烹油，会场一下子炸了——空前的大爆炸
translation_en: This is absolutely incredible! It's like boiling oil in a cauldron of fire, the scene suddenly exploded - an unprecedented massive explosion.
translation_zh: 这场景如同烈火烹油，突然就像一次无比庞大的爆炸发生了。(This scene is like boiling oil in a cauldron of fire; it suddenly exploded, just like an unprecedentedly massive explosion.)

sentence: 临阵磨刀也不顶用，只有靠平时的努力
translation_en: Preparing at the last minute and sharpening swords is not effective, only persistent effort counts.
translation_zh: 只有坚持不懈的努力才能有效，临阵磨刀是无用的。

sentence: 这样零打碎敲也不是办法
translation_en: This method of shattering without striking is not a solution
translation_zh: 这种不用打就能破裂的方法，实在是没有解决方案。(Zero strike to break, indeed, has no solution.)

sentence: 她在大人面前还是这样。那在家里是简直闹得六畜不安
translation_en: She behaves like that even in front of adults. It's as if chaos reigns at home.
translation_zh: 她就像在大人面前也会这样行事，似乎家中的和谐已经被废弃了。(六畜不安)

sentence: 见那些大哥哥还在龙马精神地说话，她也听不出味道，就打了两个哈欠，悄悄溜了出来
translation_en: She didn't catch the tone, so she yawned twice and sneaked away when she saw those big brothers still talking with dragon horse spirit.
translation_zh: 她没抓住调情，于是咳了两声并�iptoe 离开，当她看到那些大哥还在与龙马精神交谈时。

sentence: 只记得纸上龙蛇飞舞，笔势很好看的
translation_en: I only remember dragons and snakes dancing on paper, with a very good handwriting.
translation_zh: 我只记得在纸上看到了龙蛇飞舞，字迹非常美丽。

sentence: 但是他的心情十分敞朗，坚信只要度过这段困难日子，局势就会好转，任自己龙腾虎跃
translation_en: Despite his rather open-hearted mood, he firmly believes that if they manage to get through these difficult times, the situation will improve, letting him soar like a dragon and leap like a tiger.
translation_zh: 尽管他比较开朗，但他坚信如果他们能够通过这段困难时期，情况会改善，使他像龙飞翼，像虎跳奔。(龙腾虎跃)

sentence: 他赶快转过口又说道‘我不过路见不平，说几句气话罢哩！’
translation_en: He quickly turned his mouth to say, "I just happened to meet you, let me say a few casual words!"
translation_zh: 他很快地转过嘴说：“我偶然遇到你，我想随便说几句轻松话！” 路见不平。

sentence: 当年种的小树苗，如今已是绿叶成荫了
translation_en: The sapling planted that year has grown into a dense foliage now.
translation_zh: 那年种植的苗子现在已经长大成了一片密林。（绿叶成荫）

sentence: 琴弹得乱七八糟，可是她的嗓子怪清亮的
translation_en: The plucking of the qin is disorderly, but her voice is strangely clear
translation_zh: 她的吼喊虽然乱七八糟，但声音却奇异清澈。(Her chaotic shouting, but her voice is strangely clear.)

sentence: 此事我们只略知皮毛，不能擅下结论
translation_en: We only have a superficial understanding of this matter; we cannot jump to conclusions.
translation_zh: 我们只是略知皮毛地了解这个问题，不能轻率做出结论。(We only have a superficial understanding of this matter; we cannot jump to conclusions.)

sentence: 今天讲的内容很多，我们抓住荦荦大者就行
translation_en: Cover the main points as we have many topics today, it should suffice to focus on the larger ones.
translation_zh: 今天有很多话题，必须着重掌握荦荦大者。(Today there are many topics, we must focus on the major ones.)

sentence: 只要不轻敌，相信你们一定会马到成功
translation_en: As long as you don't underestimate the enemy, I believe you will certainly reach success on horseback.
translation_zh: 如果你不低估敌人，我相信你一定在马上就会成功。(马到成功)

sentence: 从此，我读什么书都不再马马虎虎了
translation_en: From now on, I will no longer read books carelessly.
translation_zh: 以后，我将不再随意地看书，而是像狗咬鼠一样专心致志。(马马虎虎)

sentence: 因为多年买空卖空的结果，文界就荒凉了，文章的形式虽然比较的整齐起来，但战斗的精神却较前有退无进
translation_en: Due to years of short selling, the literary world has become desolate; although the form of articles appears quite organized, the spirit of battle seems to have regressed rather than progressed.
translation_zh: 因为年来大量的短卖，文学世界已经变得荒凉了；尽管文章形式看起来很有组织，但是战斗的精神似乎倒退不进。这就像是“买空卖空”一样，表明短期利益导致长期损失。

sentence: 如今还不能替老百姓想，瞒上欺下，咱简直不是个人啦
translation_en: Today, we can't think for the common people; deceive up, deceive down. We're certainly not individuals.
translation_zh: 今天，我们无法为大众思考；瞒上欺下，谁也不是个独特的人。

sentence: 为什么倒弄得闹闹攘攘，满城风雨的呢
translation_en: Why does it make such a commotion, all stirred up, with the whole city in turmoil?
translation_zh: 为什么会如此喧嚣，整个城市都闹得乱七八糟，就像满城风雨一样？

sentence: 春天来了，漫山遍野都披上了绿装
translation_en: Spring has arrived, covering the mountains and fields with green clothing
translation_zh: 春天到了，漫山遍野地面上绿了衣服。(Spring has arrived, the whole mountain is covered with green clothing.)

sentence: 春天来了，漫天遍地都是杜鹃花
translation_en: Daffodils are blooming everywhere, as spring has arrived.
translation_zh: 漫天遍地，春天到了，莲花开得很美。(Literally: Everywhere under the sky is covered with daffodils, spring has arrived, lilies are blooming beautifully.)

sentence: 科学技术的发展是漫无止境的
translation_en: The development of science and technology is boundless.
translation_zh: 科学技术发展无法停歇，漫无止境。(Kēxué jìshù fāzhǎn wúfǎ tíngxiū, màn wú zhìjīng.)

sentence: 我不能叫你盲人瞎马地去乱闯
translation_en: I cannot guide you blindly to charge recklessly
translation_zh: 我无法盲目地带你奋力冲锋。(Wǒ wúlá guānmù de dài nǐ fèn lì chōng fēn.)

sentence: 十句不过懂得三句，其余都茫然不解
translation_en: Understanding only three out of ten, the rest remains obscure.
translation_zh: 三分懂，七分茫然。(Sān fēn dǒng, qī fēn mào lán.)

sentence: 这是一座孤零零立在大海当中的小岛，四面是茫无涯际的海水和天空
translation_en: This is a secluded island standing alone in the middle of the sea, surrounded by vast expanses of ocean and sky on all sides.
translation_zh: 这是一个孤立在海中的小岛，周围只有大海和空气，四面皆是茫无涯际。

sentence: 你不要希望蒙混过关
translation_en: Don't hope to get away with things unnoticed.
translation_zh: 不能期望无人察觉，蒙混过关。(Bùnéng qièwàng wúrén chájué, mēng hùn guòguān.)

sentence: 从此以后，以管弦的情绪代替了鼓的情绪，结果都是靡靡之音
translation_en: From now on, the emotional sound of strings replaced that of drums, resulting in soft, muted sounds.
translation_zh: 以后，字符串的情感音乐替代了鼓的声音，导致软弱、柔和的声音。这就像是靡靡之音一样。

sentence: 这种新见解，对于古书的矛盾可谓面面圆到
translation_en: This new interpretation can be said to resolve the contradictions of ancient texts.
translation_zh: 这新解释可以被说为弄清古文本的矛盾，就像面面圆到一样。

sentence: 如果把我们栽种在阴暗偏陬，那就染上官气暮气，苗而不秀
translation_en: If we are planted in the gloomy, declining corner, we will take on an official air of decay, sprouting but unimpressive.
translation_zh: 如果我们被种在沮丧、衰败的角落里，我们就会像腐败的官僚一样显露出来，虽然长出来了，但是却无法引起人们的注意。(苗而不秀)

sentence: 写法又明朗简洁，绝无旧文人描头画角，宛转抑扬的恶习
translation_en: The style is clear, concise, and free of archaic elements such as descriptive headings or caricatured figures; it skillfully balances highs and lows to avoid affectation.
translation_zh: 文字风格简洁明了，没有描述性标题或夸张化的人物，善于平衡高低，避免仗ffectation。这就像是“描头画角”一样，整体表现得自然而易懂。

sentence: 在这大时代里，生与死的意义固然都很重大，然而，对于一个生活在空隙当中的人，却又是多么的渺不足道呵
translation_en: In this grand era, the meaning of life and death is indeed significant, yet for someone living in the gap, it seems so insignificant.
translation_zh: 这个宏伟的时代，生死之义确实很重要，但是陷在间隙里的人，似乎它们都显得渺小无比。(渺不足道)

sentence: 田间是静悄悄的，大路上也是静悄悄的渺无人踪
translation_en: The fields are quietly serene, and the roads are equally quiet, with no trace of people.
translation_zh: 这些田野寂静如画，而路上也没有任何人的踪影。(These fields are as tranquil as paintings, and the roads have no traces of anyone.)

sentence: 这番讲话，既有好教训又说得妙趣横生，给我们官兵以极深刻的印象
translation_en: This speech is both enlightening and witty, leaving a profound impression on us officials and soldiers.
translation_zh: 这个演说既有启发性又有讽刺之处，在我们官员和士兵中留下了深刻的印象，就像妙趣横生一样。

sentence: 若不是妙手偶得，便确是经过锤炼的语言的精华
translation_en: If it weren't for a fortunate stroke, it would undoubtedly be the essence distilled through tempering of language.
translation_zh: 只有妙手偶得才能精炼语言的要素。(Only with a fortunate stroke can one distill the essence of language.)

sentence: 中国的名胜古迹值得我们去参观
translation_en: China's famous landmarks are worth visiting.
translation_zh: 中国著名的景点值得一visit，名胜古迹之中。(China's famous landmarks are worth visiting, among the renowned relics.)

sentence: 中国的长城名闻遐迩
translation_en: The Great Wall of China is famous far and wide.
translation_zh: 名闻遐迩的长城被广泛认可。(The Great Wall of China is widely recognized as being famous far and wide.)

sentence: 明眼人可以看出你这是明升暗降的把戏
translation_en: A discerning person can see that this is a game of ascend-descend.
translation_zh: 这是一个明升暗降的游戏，聪明的人一定能看出来。(This is a game of ascend-descend, a discerning person will certainly notice.)

sentence: 他害怕事情一旦变化，他将有不测大祸，所以跪在地上回答了一句模棱两可的话
translation_en: He fears that once the situation changes, he will face great calamity, so he knelt on the ground and answered with an ambiguous phrase.
translation_zh: 因为他担心情况改变后，自己会面临巨大危机，所以他跪在地上用一个模棱两可的回答答复了。(He is in a quandary about what to do because he fears that once the situation changes, he will face great calamity, so he kneels on the ground and answers with an ambiguous phrase.)

sentence: 这是第一次出马，人们都摩拳擦掌，心里突突跳着准备战斗
translation_en: This is the first time appearing, everyone claps hands and bows deeply, hearts pounding with anticipation for battle.
translation_zh: 这是第一次出现，每个人都掌握高兴地拍手并深深弯腰，心跳加速，充满战斗的期待。

sentence: 没有磨杵成针的毅力，学问上就不可能有很深的造诣
translation_en: Without the determination to grind an axe into a needle, it is impossible to have profound mastery in scholarly pursuits.
translation_zh: 只有坚定地磨杵成针的决心，才能在学问上达到深刻的精通。

sentence: 讨论会上，大家都对提出的问题踊跃发表意见，而他却一直默不作声
translation_en: During the discussion, everyone actively expressed their opinions on the proposed questions, but he remained silent throughout.
translation_zh: 讨论中，每个人都积极表达了对提出问题的看法，但他一直保持沉默。默不作声。

sentence: 谁愿意做目光如鼠的人，只是嗅着鼻子前面的一点油香
translation_en: Who is willing to act like someone with eyes as sharp as a mouse, only catching a whiff of the scent before their nose?
translation_zh: 谁愿意像有眼睛如鼠的人一样，只能在气味前鼻子上闻到一丝？

sentence: 这个故事的结尾留下了一个悬念，耐人寻味
translation_en: The ending of this story leaves a suspense, intriguing to ponder
translation_zh: 这个故事的结尾让人耐人寻味。(This story's ending is intriguing to ponder)

sentence: 你要通知到村里的男女老少
translation_en: Notify the villagers, men, women, and children.
translation_zh: 请通知村民，男女老少都要收到通知。(Please notify all villagers, including men, women, old and young.)

sentence: 这个说话南腔北调的人，不适合当解说员
translation_en: This person who speaks with a southern accent and a northern tone is unsuitable for being a commentator.
translation_zh: 这个带有南方口音和北方调侃的人不适合当评论员。（这个人，带有“南腔北调”的口气）

sentence: 现在则相反，除粮食外，每天每人只有五分大洋的油盐柴菜钱，还是难乎为继
translation_en: Life is still a struggle, as each person only has five cents worth of oil, salt, firewood, and vegetables daily.
translation_zh: 每天只有五分钱的油、盐、木头和蔬菜，生活还是一场奋斗，就像难乎为继一样。(Life is still a struggle, just like trying to continue with only five cents' worth of oil, salt, wood, and vegetables each day, which is similar to the idiom "difficult to continue.")

sentence: 要这个守财奴募捐，那真是难如登天
translation_en: To recruit donations for this money-grubbing servant, that would indeed be as hard as climbing heaven.
translation_zh: 为这个钱吸引捐款，实在像是登天一样困难。(Harder than climbing heaven to raise funds for this greedy servant.)

sentence: 这件事情真是让人难以置信
translation_en: This event is hard to believe.
translation_zh: 这个事情很难以置信。(This event is hard to believe.)

sentence: 这个月开销太大，不到月底就囊空如洗了
translation_en: Expenditure this month is too large, the purse will be empty before the end of the month.
translation_zh: 本月支出过大，囊空如洗之前就没有钱了。(This month's expenditure is too large, the purse will be empty like washing it before the end of the month.)

sentence: 这些由能工巧匠手工织绣的彩锦，运销世界各地
translation_en: These silk brocades, handmade by skilled artisans, are exported to various parts of the world.
translation_zh: 这些手工绢，由精通技艺的工匠制作，被导出到世界各地。(These silk brocades, handmade by skilled artisans, are exported to various parts of the world. The idiom "能工巧匠" means "skilled craftsman.")

sentence: 这就叫大丈夫能屈能伸
translation_en: A gentleman is adaptable.
translation_zh: 一个君子是能屈能伸的。(A gentleman is adaptable.)

sentence: 你不妨耐心地听一听逆耳良言，也许这对于你是有好处的
translation_en: You might do well to patiently listen to some good advice from behind the ear, it may prove beneficial for you.
translation_zh: 从后耳听取一些好的建议，可能对你有益。(逆耳良言)

sentence: 趁你们年富力强的时候，为人民做出更多的贡献吧
translation_en: Seize your wealth, power, and influence when you have them, and make more contributions to the people instead.
translation_zh: 年富力强，就要抓住财富、权力和影响力，并为人民做更多贡献。(Seize your wealth, power, and influence when you have them, and make more contributions to the people instead.)

sentence: 我最初实在替这孩子捏一把汗，待到掘出黄金一釜，这才觉得轻松
translation_en: I initially felt quite sweaty for this child, but once we dug up a cauldron of gold, I finally felt relaxed.
translation_zh: 首先，我对这个孩子感到了一阵汗水，但是当我们挖出一缸金子后，我才终于放松下来。在这个过程中，我也捏了一把汗。

sentence: 为了不影响别人，同学们在阅览室里走路都是蹑手蹑脚的
translation_en: To avoid disturbing others, students walk quietly in the library.
translation_zh: 在图书馆里，学生悄悄地走动以免吵醒他人。(In the library, students walk quietly so as not to disturb others.)

sentence: 只是近来常常在梦中，或是在将醒未醒之顷，一阵悚然，从前所怕的牛头马面，都积压了来，都聚围了来
translation_en: Frequently, lately, in dreams or on the verge of waking, a sudden sense of unease arises, and the fearsome images of ox-head and horse-face have accumulated, have surrounded me.
translation_zh: 近日，梦中或逾晓时，突然有一种不安的感觉出现，而牛头马面的凶猛形象已经积累到了周围我。(In recent days, a sudden sense of unease often arises either in dreams or upon waking, and the fearsome images of ox-head and horse-face have already gathered around me.)

sentence: 你不要忸怩作态好不好
translation_en: Don't act timid, okay?
translation_zh: 请不要害羞地表现，好吗？（忸怩作态）

sentence: 你不要扭曲作直了
translation_en: Don't distort things to make them seem straight.
translation_zh: 不要扭曲事情以使其看起来直接。(Don't distort things to make them seem straight.)

sentence: 这种排山倒海的巨潮，是任何顽固势力所不能抵挡得住的
translation_en: This tsunami-like surge, no rigid force can withstand it.
translation_zh: 这个浪潮似 tsunami，任何坚固的力量都无法抵挡。（排山倒海）

sentence: 从此之后，中国文坛新旧的界限，判若鸿沟
translation_en: From this point onward, the boundary between old and new in China's literary world becomes as clear as day and night.
translation_zh: 从此以后，中国文学世界的旧和新之界，就像鸿沟一样清晰明了。(judan hong gu)

sentence: 到这里来抛头露面，好不识羞
translation_en: Come here just to show face, shamelessly
translation_zh: 抛头露面地来过，无耻的。(Come over with a face-saving gesture, shameless.)

sentence: 他跑马观花地把这部诗剧读了一遍，已经是傍晚时分了
translation_en: He ran to the flower viewing park and read the play-poem all the way through, it was already evening.
translation_zh: 他跑到花卉园里，一直读完了那首戏诗，已经是晚上了。(He ran to the flower viewing park and read the play-poem all the way through, it was already evening.)

sentence: 现在，全大队二十六个山塘水库，已经配套成龙，形成了一个水利灌溉网
translation_en: The twenty-six reservoirs in the entire squadron of mountain ponds have been connected, forming a water supply irrigation network.
translation_zh: 二十六个山池队伍的水库已经连通，形成了一网通畅的水源渠道。这就像配套成龙一样，各部分协调合作，共同完成了整体的目标。

sentence: 我一见到她就怦然心动
translation_en: I'm immediately drawn to her
translation_zh: 她的魅力立刻吸引了我，怦然心动。(Her charm immediately draws me, tediously stirring my heart.)

sentence: 我每遇着我所敬爱而知心的人，就喜欢披肝沥胆地畅谈
translation_en: I enjoy speaking candidly with those whom I deeply respect.
translation_zh: 我与深重尊敬的人们喜欢直言不讳。(I enjoy speaking candidly with those whom I deeply respect.)

sentence: 雨呀，披头盖脑地浇下来，顺脖子灌进去
translation_en: It's raining, soaking through my clothes and running down my neck.
translation_zh: 下雨了，披头盖脑地吹进我的衣服和跑到我的领子。(It's raining, soaking through my clothes and running down my neck like I didn't think it through.)

sentence: 这一趟出差弄得疲惫不堪
translation_en: This business trip has left me utterly exhausted.
translation_zh: 这次商务旅行使我完全疲惫不堪。(This business trip has left me utterly exhausted.)

sentence: 他总是乐于听取大家的意见，从不偏听偏信
translation_en: He always welcomes everyone's opinions, never being biased or prejudiced.
translation_zh: 他总是欢迎每个人的意见，永远不会偏见或偏见。（偏听偏信）

sentence: 回想当年他翩翩年少，不知有多少女孩子为他倾倒
translation_en: Remembering that year, many girls were smitten with him when he was young.
translation_zh: 那年回忆时，他年轻时很多女孩被吸引了。(Remembering that year, many girls were smitten with him when he was young.)

sentence: 现在还常有骈四俪六，典丽堂皇的祭文、挽联、宣言、通电
translation_en: Still frequently have vulgar four-letter words, elegant and grand eulogies, elegies, proclamations, and power outages.
translation_zh: 仍然频繁地使用低俗的四个字母词，高雅奔溢的诗歌和谣歌、诗 elegy 和宣言，还有电力中断。这时候就要用上 "骈四俪六" 了，即不能在公共场合使用低俗语言。

sentence: 他是一名品学兼优的好学生
translation_en: He is an excellent student with both academic and moral excellence.
translation_zh: 他是一位具有学术和道德优异水平的优秀学生。(He is an excellent student with both academic and moral excellence. / 品学兼优)

sentence: 学习上的提高总得有个过程，不可能平步登天
translation_en: Learning always requires a process, it's impossible to leap directly to success.
translation_zh: 学习总是需要一个过程，直接跳到成功是不可能的。这就像是平步登天一样。(Learning always requires a process; it's impossible to leap directly to success. This is like stepping on level ground to reach heaven.)

sentence: 你应该多干点实事，不要总评头论足
translation_en: You should do more practical things, instead of always commenting on others.
translation_zh: 你应该多做实际的事情，而不是一直对他人发表意见。（评头论足）

sentence: 新的内战危机忽然又迫在眉睫了
translation_en: A new internal crisis looms suddenly before our eyes
translation_zh: 突然就在我们眼前出现了一场内部危机，似乎已经迫在眉睫了。(A sudden internal crisis has appeared right before our eyes, it seems it's already pressing upon us.)

sentence: 我们要破除迷信，解放思想，大胆改革
translation_en: We aim to eliminate superstitions, free minds, and daring reforms
translation_zh: 我们努力破除迷信，释放思想，并进行敢于改革的推进。(We aim to eliminate superstitions, free minds, and daring reforms)

sentence: 只要我们有破釜沉舟的决心，就能克服学习上的各种困难
translation_en: As long as we have the determination to break through barriers, we can overcome various difficulties in learning.
translation_zh: 只要我们有坚定的决心，就能用力克服学习中的各种困难。破釜沉舟，不管遇到什么障碍，都要坚持前进。

sentence: 我们要破旧立新改变封建意识
translation_en: We need to overthrow old traditions, establish new ones, and change feudal mentality.
translation_zh: 我们需要破旧立新，摧毁古老的传统，建立新的习惯，改变封建思想。(We need to overthrow old traditions, establish new ones, and change feudal mentality.)

sentence: 洪水霎时铺天盖地而来，冲倒了树木和房屋
translation_en: Floods suddenly cover the sky and come rushing, overturning trees and houses.
translation_zh: 突然，雨水如洪流，席卷树木和房屋。这就像铺天盖地一样。(Literally: Suddenly, rainwater rushes like a flood, sweeping away trees and houses. It's just like covering the sky and earth.)

sentence: 他这篇论文没有新意，都是从杂志上东抄西抄，七拼八凑来的
translation_en: This paper lacks originality; it is merely a compilation from various magazines, pieced together haphazardly.
translation_zh: 这篇论文缺乏创新性，只是从各种杂志中抄袭而来，无序地拼接在一起。(七拼八凑)

sentence: 谁都有妻儿老小的
translation_en: Who has wives, daughters, and small children.
translation_zh: 谁有妻儿老小，就是家人多了。

sentence: 感情的激动使我说话期期艾艾了
translation_en: Emotional excitement made me stutter and speak haltingly.
translation_zh: 我的情绪激动使我哑口无言，如同《期期艾艾》一般。

sentence: 工人们齐心合力，只用一天时间就把道路修好了
translation_en: The workers worked together with great effort, and they managed to repair the road within one day.
translation_zh: 齐心合力，工人一天就能修好这条路。(With united hearts and combined efforts, the workers can repair this road within one day.)

sentence: 对社会上的一些奇谈怪论，我们要有识别能力
translation_en: We need discernment regarding certain strange or unfounded discussions about society
translation_zh: 我们需要对某些异常或无据的社会讨论具有判断力。(在这些异常或无据的社会讨论中，我们需要有判断力)

sentence: 你不要怕他气焰嚣张的样子
translation_en: Don't be afraid of his arrogant demeanor.
translation_zh: 他的高傲之貌不必怕，而是要学会冷静地应对。(His arrogant demeanor need not be feared; instead, one should learn to respond calmly.)

sentence: 老师举的这个例子恰如其分，同学们很快就掌握了这种方法
translation_en: The example given by the teacher was perfectly illustrative, and the students quickly grasped this method.
translation_zh: 教师提供的例子恰如其分，学生很快就理解了这种方法。(The example given by the teacher is just right, and the students quickly understood this method.)

sentence: 让他们都显显身手，谁能把这个千疮百孔的中国从热火里救出来，算谁有本事
translation_en: Let them all show their skills, who can rescue this thousand wounds, hundred holes China from the fiery chaos, who dares to claim competence?
translation_zh: 谁能救治这千疮百孔的中国，谁敢自称有能力？

sentence: 他历尽了千难万险终于回到了阔别五十年的老家
translation_en: He finally returned to his hometown after enduring countless hardships and dangers, which had been fifty years apart.
translation_zh: 他终于回到了老家，经历了无数困难和危险，这些已经过去了五十年。（千难万险）

sentence: 海洋里的生物千奇百怪，非常迷人
translation_en: Marine life is incredibly diverse and fascinating.
translation_zh: " marine life 是 千奇百怪的 和趣可观 " (Hái sheng shì qiān qí bǎi guài de hé jù kěguān )

sentence: 有时句法也大约受些影响，而且前车可鉴
translation_en: Syntax can sometimes approximately be influenced, and moreover, precedents can serve as guidance.
translation_zh: 语法可能会有所影响，而且先驱可以作为指引。(前车可鉴)

sentence: 你尚差一年大学毕业，若现在辍学，岂非前功尽废
translation_en: If you graduate from university next year, and drop out now, wouldn't that be squandering past achievements?
translation_zh: 如果你明年毕业，现在却放弃，那就是浪费过去成就了。(前功尽废)

sentence: 放学了，同学们前呼后拥地走出了校园
translation_en: The students walked out of the schoolyard, cheering and linking arms after school.
translation_zh: 学生们在学校院子外走出，喊着欢声笑语，手牵手。(The students walked out of the schoolyard, cheering and linking arms, with their hands clasped together.)

sentence: 这些不法分子的黔驴之计，早已被公安人员识破了
translation_en: These criminal plans of the ruffians have been exposed by the police personnel.
translation_zh: 这些刺客的诡计已经被警察人员揭发了出来。（这些刺客的诡计就像黔驴之计，已经被揭发了）

sentence: 不论所谈论的是政治、宗教或社会问题，均不应把自己的意见强加于人，硬要别人接受
translation_en: Regardless of whether it's about politics, religion, or social issues, one should not impose their own opinions on others, nor force them to accept.
translation_zh: 无论政治、宗教还是社会问题，就不应该强加自己的看法于他人，也不能迫使他们接受。(强加于人)

sentence: 二三十只皮鞋的交响曲，登时冲破巷里悄然无声的黑暗
translation_en: Twenty-three sets of leather shoes' counterpoint, suddenly burst through the quiet, unassuming darkness of the alleyway
translation_zh: Twenty-three sets of leather shoes' counterpoint, all of a sudden, quietly and stealthily emerged from the tranquil obscurity of the alleyway.

sentence: 每个国家都应严防他国乔装改扮的间谍与特务分子的渗透
translation_en: Each country should strictly guard against infiltration by spies and agents disguised as citizens of other nations.
translation_zh: 每个国家应当严格防范外国偷渡者和以其他国民身份伪装的间谍和特工，必须乔装改扮自己的真实面目。(Each country should strictly guard against infiltration by spies and agents disguised as citizens of other nations; they must present themselves truthfully with the idiom "乔装改扮.")

sentence: 向企业巧立名目收费的做法是不利于企业发展的
translation_en: Charging for services aimed at boosting a company's reputation is detrimental to its development.
translation_zh: 巧立名目地提供服务会损害公司发展。(Providing services with the aim of boosting a company's reputation will be detrimental to its development.)

sentence: 这个商人巧舌如簧，把次品说成是优等品，欺骗消费者
translation_en: This merchant is cunningly eloquent, passing off inferior goods as superior ones, deceiving consumers.
translation_zh: 这个商人巧舌如簧，妄表良品，骗取消费者。(This merchant is cunningly eloquent, falsely claiming good quality, deceiving consumers.)

sentence: 只有切身体会的经验才是真实而深刻的
translation_en: Only firsthand experience is truly and profoundly real.
translation_zh: 只有切身体会的经验才是真实且深刻的。(Only firsthand experience is truly and profoundly real.)

sentence: 总算安然改业，否则也许还有一段青黄不接的失业时期
translation_en: At last, safely changing business; otherwise, there might still be an uninterrupted period of unemployment and joblessness.
translation_zh: 最后安全地转业，否则可能还有无工无业的连续期间。这里用了“青黄不接”的意思是，两个事情或状态之间没有任何联系或过渡，也就是说，转业后可能会带来一段时间的就业机会。

sentence: 写文章该详的地方要详，不可轻描淡写
translation_en: The important parts of writing an article should be detailed, not briefly written.
translation_zh: 重要的文章写作部分应该是详细的，而不是简略的。（轻描淡写）

sentence: 谁要是在团结两个字上不生长些诚意，他即使不被人唾骂，也当清夜扪心，有点儿羞愧
translation_en: Whoever fails to grow some sincerity from unity, even if they are not scorned by others, will spend sleepless nights self-reflecting with a hint of shame.
translation_zh: 谁没有从团结中长出一丝诚意，即使别人不嘲笑他，也会在自我反思中无法睡着，带着一丝丧失的感觉。

sentence: 下乡只是蜻蜓点水式的，还要带白馒头
translation_en: Going rural is just a drop in the ocean, one should also bring steamed buns with them.
translation_zh: 去农村就像是在一滴水中泡下，人也应该带上包子。(去农村就像是在一滴水中泡下，这个表达方式是“蜻蜓点水”的自然整合)

sentence: 好的诗篇必然是情景交融，理在其中
translation_en: A good poem necessarily blends scenarios, with its essence hidden within.
translation_zh: 好诗必然是场景融合，其精髓隐藏在中间。(The essence is hidden within the blending of scenes in a good poem.)

sentence: 别人亦只能略举大凡，不能穷原竟委
translation_en: Others can only briefly touch upon common matters, not exhaustively explore them completely.
translation_zh: 他人只能浅谈常事，不能彻底探索。(穷原竟委)

sentence: 我凑着茕茕孑立的小油灯，尽情享受秋灯夜读的乐趣
translation_en: I cozy up to the solitary, flickering little oil lamp, fully enjoying the pleasure of autumn reading by candlelight.
translation_zh: 我坐在单独的小油灯旁，窝在其中，享受秋天用蜡烛阅读的乐趣，就像是茕茕孑立一样。

sentence: 印刷用纸若是求过于供，便会影响出版品的及时问世
translation_en: If there is an excess of printing paper, it may affect the timely publication of the book.
translation_zh: 如果印刷纸张多余，可能会影响书的及时出版。（过于供：过多的供应）

sentence: 在这个问题上，我们还是求同存异吧
translation_en: Let's agree to disagree on this matter, shall we?
translation_zh: 我们就这个问题上，可以认为有所不同吧？（求同存异）

sentence: 这篇小说写一个青年的心理变化，真可算是曲尽奇妙
translation_en: This novel beautifully captures the psychological evolution of a young man, truly remarkable.
translation_zh: 这本小说精美地捕捉了一位年轻男子的心理发展，实在是非常奇妙。(曲尽奇妙)

sentence: 中国民族工业就只剩下屈指可数的几项了
translation_en: Only a few industries remain for China's national industries.
translation_zh: 只有几个行业仍然属于中国的国家行业，就像屈指可数一样。(Only a few industries still belong to China's national industries, just like can be counted on one's fingers.)

sentence: 外来干部和本地干部各有长处，也各有短处，必须互相取长补短，才能有进步
translation_en: Foreign officials and local officials each have their strengths, as well as weaknesses; they must compensate for each other's shortcomings to make progress.
translation_zh: 外国官员和本地官员各有其优势，也有自己的弱点；他们需要互相补充弥补彼此的不足，才能进步。（取长补短）

sentence: 当时的情况是弱国抵抗强国。文中指出了战前的政治准备——取信于民
translation_en: At that time, the situation was one of a weak country resisting a strong one. The text mentions the political preparations before the war - relying on the people.
translation_zh: 在那时，国家的状态是弱国抵抗强国。文本提到了战争之前的政治准备——依靠人民。这个时候，我们就要取信于民了。(At that time, we should rely on the people.)

sentence: 对于古典文学，我们要去粗取精，辩证对待
translation_en: We should select the essentials and discard the superfluous when it comes to classical literature, and adopt a dialectical approach.
translation_zh: 我们应当选择经典文学的要点，摒弃多余的部分，采用方言论法。(Go coarse, take the essence)

sentence: 战争历史中有在连战皆捷之后吃了一个败仗以至全功尽弃的
translation_en: Fought multiple victorious battles only to suffer a defeat that led to complete abandonment of all efforts in war history.
translation_zh: 虽然曾经奋战多次取得胜利，但最后却遭受了致命的败北，导致在历史上完全放弃所有的战争努力。这就像是“全功尽弃”一样。(Simplified Chinese: 虽然曾经奋战多次取得胜利，但最后却遭受了致命的败北，导致在历史上完全放弃所有的战争努力。这就像

sentence: 他们缺乏一种主动的积极的高兴的欢迎的全力以赴的精神
translation_en: They lack an active, enthusiastic, joyful spirit of wholehearted welcome.
translation_zh: 他们缺乏积极、热情、快乐地欢迎的整体热情。(全力以赴)

sentence: 每个学生都要德智体全面发展，三者缺一不可
translation_en: Every student should develop holistically, intellectually, morally, and physically; none can be lacking in one.
translation_zh: 每位学生都应该全面发展，智力、道德和体育方面都要充分发挥；没有一个方面可以忽略。（缺一不可）

sentence: 我们觉得却之不恭，只好让他劳驾
translation_en: We find it inappropriate, so we have to let him drive.
translation_zh: 由于他驾驶比较适合，所以我们只能让他开车了。(But he drives more suitably, so we can only let him drive.)

sentence: 虚心使人进步，骄傲使人落后，这是确凿不移的真理
translation_en: Humility leads to progress, arrogance leads to falling behind; this is an unshakable truth.
translation_zh: 谦虚进步，自大落后；这是一个确凿不移的真理。(Humility leads to progress, arrogance leads to falling behind; this is an unshakable truth.)

sentence: 社会动荡，群魔乱舞的时代早已一去不复返了
translation_en: Turbulent times, with demons dancing wildly, have long since passed and will not return.
translation_zh: 过去的混乱时期，妖魔闹天已经远去不再。（群魔乱舞）

sentence: 这些坏作风应该根除，以免群起效尤
translation_en: These bad habits should be eradicated to prevent them from spreading further.
translation_zh: 这些坏习惯应该被消灭，以防止它们继续扩散。(这里使用了“群起效尤”idiom)

sentence: 学生在教课上得不到满足，在校内便时常爱闹风潮，在校外也时常惹是生非
translation_en: Students cannot get satisfied during lessons, they often create disturbances on campus, and they also frequently cause controversy off campus.
translation_zh: 学生在课堂上不会感到满足，他们常常在校园内造成哗然，并且在校园外也经常引起争议。（学生在课堂上不会感到满足，他们就像惹是生非了）

sentence: 我们的时代是人才辈出的时代
translation_en: Our era is an age of talent emergence
translation_zh: 这个时代是人才辈出的时代。(This era is an age of talent emergence)

sentence: 这一家子真是人丁兴旺
translation_en: This family is thriving with people.
translation_zh: 这个家庭人丁兴旺，人多气壮。(This family is bustling with people, it's lively due to many people.)

sentence: 各地监狱，都有人满为患之苦
translation_en: Prisons across the country are plagued by overcrowding.
translation_zh: 人满为患，狱中也成困局。(Overcrowding brings about problems; prisons also become congested situations.)

sentence: 这是人命关天的大事，千万不能大意
translation_en: This is a matter of life and death, absolutely cannot be taken lightly.
translation_zh: 这是生死关头的事情，绝对不能轻视。(This is a matter of life and death, absolutely cannot be taken lightly. People's lives are as important as heaven.)

sentence: 小说的许多章节便刻画出生动的人情世态
translation_en: Many chapters of the novel vividly portray lively human relationships and social atmosphere.
translation_zh: 这本小说多个章节呈现了生动的人情和时代氛围。(This novel has many chapters that vividly depict lively human relationships and social atmosphere. The idiom "人情世态" is integrated into the sentence as "生动的人情和时代氛围".)

sentence: 节日的公园人山人海，热闹极了
translation_en: The park during festivals is crowded with people, extremely lively.
translation_zh: 人山人海的公园，极为热闹。(During festivals, the park is extremely lively, like a sea of people.)

sentence: 几十年来本地发生了巨变，每回首往昔都有人世沧桑之感
translation_en: Over the past several decades, there has been a great transformation in the local area, and every time I look back to the past, I feel a sense of turbulent times.
translation_zh: 过去几十年，当地区域发生了巨大的变革，每次回忆往事，我都感受到一种�urbulent times 的感觉。(人世沧桑)

sentence: 那个地方虽然很小，但是人烟稠密
translation_en: That place may be small, but it is densely populated.
translation_zh: 那个地方虽然小，但人烟稠密。(That place may be small, but it is densely populated.)

sentence: 况且他们还说和我们共同管理，总算是仁至义尽的了
translation_en: They have indeed gone to great lengths, as they claim to manage together with us, showing utmost fairness.
translation_zh: 他们确实努力到了极致，就像我们一起管理的那样，表现得非常公正。(They have indeed gone to great lengths, just like we are managing together, showing utmost fairness. 仁至义尽)

sentence: 倘若有了开始，以后什么都可以任其自然了
translation_en: If we have a start, everything can follow naturally afterwards
translation_zh: 如果我们有开始，就可以自然而然地顺利进行下去。(If we have a start, we can proceed smoothly and naturally thereafter.)

sentence: 人民教师肩负着培养祖国建设接班人的重担，任重道远
translation_en: Teachers of the people bear the heavy responsibility of nurturing successors for building the nation, a long and arduous journey.
translation_zh: 教师们承担着培养国家继辈的重大责任，是一条长且艰难的旅程。（任重道远）

sentence: 我们希望能有日进斗金的好差使
translation_en: We hope to have a good day progressing towards achieving the Jade Rabbit Gold.
translation_zh: 我们希望每天都能逐渐向着玉兔金进步。(Each day, we hope to make steady progress towards the Jade Rabbit Gold.)

sentence: 学习外语没有什么诀窍，只有靠日久天长地积累
translation_en: There's no secret to learning a foreign language, only persistence over time accumulates it.
translation_zh: 只有坚持不懈地学习外语，时间积累而成。(日久天长)

sentence: 财主们已经是日落西山，红不过一会儿了
translation_en: The wealthy have become sunset in the west, their redness will fade soon.
translation_zh: 富人已经成了夕阳，他们的红色很快就会消失。(Translation: The wealthy have become sunset in the west, their redness will fade soon.)

sentence: 万千的学问家和实行家，不懂得这种方法，结果如堕烟海，找不到中心，也就找不到解决矛盾的方法
translation_en: Those versed in theory and practice, unfamiliar with this method, end up like lost in a smoke-filled sea, unable to find a center, hence unable to find a solution to their conflicts.
translation_zh: 理论实践双全，不掌握此方法的人，就像陷入烟海中一样，无法找到中心，因而无法解决自己的冲突。(如堕烟海)

sentence: 两个茶房将第二箱抬到舱面上，他如法炮制，一箱书又变成了一箱半，还撕碎了几个厚纸包
translation_en: Two tea rooms lifted the second box onto the deck, he followed protocol, another box of books became half a box, and several thick paper packages were torn apart.
translation_zh: 两个茶房将第二个箱子提上坞，他按照规定操作，另一个书盒变成了一半的书盒，几个厚重的纸包被撕开。如法炮制。

sentence: 我如饥似渴地把那二十几页的长文，一口气读下去
translation_en: I devoured that long article of about twenty pages in one breath
translation_zh: 我在一口气地读完了那篇二十多页的长文章，就像是如饥似渴一样。(I read that long article of about twenty pages in one breath, just like being extremely hungry and thirsty.)

sentence: 单是提倡新式标点，就会有一大群人若丧考妣
translation_en: Advocating for modern punctuation will cause a large group of people to lose their cool.
translation_zh: 推动现代逗点会导致许多人失控，就像若丧考妣一样。(推动现代逗点会使许多人失控，就像若丧考妣这般)

sentence: 除了‘惋惜’以外，还带点‘何苦来’的意味。不，甚至也还带着‘麻烦的日子终于也过完了’的若释重负的意思
translation_en: Besides a sense of regret, there is also a hint of 'why bother' and an almost relieved feeling that 'troublesome days have finally passed'.
translation_zh: 除了后悔的感觉之外，还有一丝“为什么劳动”和“终于过去了苦难日子”的暗示，就好比“释放了重担”了。

sentence: 他是个社会活动家，朋友遍及三教九流
translation_en: He is a social activist, with friends spanning three major religions and nine schools of thought.
translation_zh: 他是一个社会活动家，朋友包括三教九流的各种宗教和思想。(He is a social activist, his friends span the three teachings and nine streams of thought.)

sentence: 要一一介绍出来，恐怕三年五载也说不完
translation_en: It would probably take three to five years to introduce everything one by one.
translation_zh: 三年五载内，逐步介绍一切。(Three to five years will pass gradually as we introduce everything one by one.)

sentence: 大学毕业，年届三十，婚姻难就，累得三朋四友八方搭线，但一次一次介绍终未能成就
translation_en: Graduated from university, at thirty years old, finding a spouse proved difficult, even with friends making introductions left and right; however, each introduction failed to succeed.
translation_zh: 大学毕业后，三十岁了，找一个配偶很难，甚至有些朋友介绍也没用，每次都失败了。这就像是三朋四友之中，找不到一个真正的朋友一样。(Translation: After graduating from university, it was hard to find a spouse at thirty, even with friends introducing left and right; every attempt failed. This is like not being able to find a true friend among three close acquaintances.)

sentence: 在今天，男人三妻四妾是可耻的事，还有什么值得骄傲的
translation_en: In today's society, having multiple wives and concubines is shameful. What else is there to be proud of?
translation_zh: 今天的社会，多有几个人拥有多妻多妾，这样的行为实在令人抱头顿愤。什么值得自豪呢？

sentence: 如今丧尽天良的官府要害他们，因此上我家里躲几天
translation_en: They are being threatened by the corrupt government, so they're hiding at my place for a few days.
translation_zh: 因为他们被腐败政府威胁，所以他们在我家隐居了几天。（丧尽天良）

sentence: 我是常不免于弄弄笔墨的，写了下来，印了出去，对于有些人似乎总是搔着痒处的时候少
translation_en: I am often fiddling with pens and ink, and when I've written it down and printed it out, it seems to always escape some people's itchy spots.
translation_zh: 我经常在玩笔和墨水，写完打印后却总会逃脱一些人的痒处。(I am often fiddling with pens and ink, and when I've written it down and printed it out, it seems to always escape some people's itchy spots. Translated and integrated the idiom "搔着痒处" into the sentence.)

sentence: 要知道这种举动，和战士在战争时的杀敌致果，功罪是绝对相反的
translation_en: This kind of action is absolutely opposite to a warrior's result of killing enemies during war, regarding merit and demerit.
translation_zh: 这种行动与战士在战争中击败敌人所获得的功劳和过失完全相反，正是“杀敌致果”。

sentence: 监狱内杀气腾腾，突然充满了火药气味
translation_en: Prison air thick with tension, suddenly filled with gunpowder smell
translation_zh: 狱中氛围凝重，突然充满了火药味。(杀气腾腾)

sentence: 为了防止凶手杀人灭口，目击证人正受警方严密保护
translation_en: Witnesses are under strict police protection to prevent the murderer from being silenced.
translation_zh: 为了防止凶手被沉默，目击者处于严格警察保护之下。(Witnesses are under strict police protection to prevent the murderer from being silenced. Killers will have their voices extinguished.)

sentence: 想当初山盟海誓，可现在怎么就要分手了
translation_en: Wishing we had made promises under the mountains and by the sea, how come we're breaking up now?
translation_zh: 我们为何现在分手，当初就应该在山中和海边做出契约呢？（使用了“山盟海誓”）

sentence: 为了寻找地下的矿产资源，地质勘探队员走遍了祖国的山南海北
translation_en: To find underground mineral resources, the geological exploration team traversed the south of mountains and north of seas across the country.
translation_zh: 为了发现地下矿物资源，地质探索队经过国内的山南海北。(Translation: To find underground mineral resources, the geological exploration team traversed the south of mountains and north of seas across the country.)

sentence: 我的家乡是个山清水秀的好地方
translation_en: My hometown is a beautiful place with clear mountains and flowing waters.
translation_zh: 我的故乡是一处山清水秀的美丽地方。(My hometown is a beautiful place with clear mountains and flowing waters, where the scenery is picturesque.)

sentence: 什么事竟使你姗姗来迟
translation_en: What caused you to arrive late?
translation_zh: 为什么你姗姗来迟？(What caused you to arrive late?) + 姗姗来迟(idiom) = 为什么你姗姗来迟了？(Why were you tardy?)

sentence: 不去呢，她必不会善罢甘休；去呢，她也不会饶了他
translation_en: She will by no means rest content if she doesn't go; if she does go, she won't spare him either.
translation_zh: 她绝不会因为没有出发而满足，出发了也不会对他轻易放过。(She will by no means rest content if she doesn't go; if she does go, she won't spare him either.)

sentence: 他的弟弟都精精壮壮，唯他瘦弱，善眉善眼的一副忠厚可怜相
translation_en: His younger brother is all robust and vigorous, but he himself is weak and thin, with an expression of loyal and pitiful kindness.
translation_zh: 他的弟弟很健康壮实，但是自己却薄弱而瘦小，表情充满忠诚和可怜的俭淡。(善眉善眼)

sentence: 做生意讲究诚信，否则顾客上当学乖，以后就不再上门来了
translation_en: Trust is crucial in business, otherwise customers will be deceived and become compliant, hence they won't visit again.
translation_zh: 在商业中，信任是至关重要的，否则客户会被��eguile 而成为契合者，因此他们不会再来。(Trust is crucial in business; if it's not there, customers will be deceived and become compliant, so they won't come back.)

sentence: 后起的模拟者总不免比创始者要稍逊一筹
translation_en: Latecomers to simulation often fall slightly short of the originators
translation_zh: 迟到的模拟参与者往往略落后于开创人，即：稍逊一筹。

sentence: 我俩本是少小无猜，虽然装作新娘和新郎的模样，实还不知新娘和新郎有什么关系
translation_en: We were once innocent children, although we pretended to be bride and groom, we still didn't know what relationship bride and groom have.
translation_zh: 虽然我们曾是如花似鹤的孩子，但我们还是不知道妻子和夫君之间有什么关系。那时候就像《少小无猜》一样，我们并没有察觉到婚姻的真正意义。

sentence: 亲戚本家都说到舌敝唇焦，也终于阻挡不住
translation_en: Relatives from both sides have said that his tongue is furry and lips burnt, but they can no longer hold back.
translation_zh: 他的舌敝唇焦，已无法再抗拒了。(His tongue is furry and lips burnt, he can no longer resist.)

sentence: 写文章只追求形式而不注重内容，那是舍本逐末
translation_en: Pursuing formality over substance in writing is chasing the tail, which means it's misguided.
translation_zh: 在写作中崇拜形式，忽视实质，就像在追尾一样，这是错误的。(Translation: In writing, emphasizing formality while neglecting substance is like chasing the tail, which means it's misguided.)

sentence: 舍己救人也要凑好了机会，不然，你把肉割下来给别人吃，人们还说许说你的肉中含有传染病的细菌
translation_en: If you want to save others, seize the opportunity as well; otherwise, you'll give away your meat for others to eat, and people will say that there are pathogenic bacteria in your meat.
translation_zh: 如果你想为他人保存生命，就要及时行动；否则，你会让别人吃掉你的肉，人们就会说你的肉有病虫害。（使用了“舍己救人”）

sentence: 我们从小就应当培养自己具有舍己为公的好品德
translation_en: We should cultivate ourselves to have the noble character of putting public interest above self from a young age.
translation_zh: 从小就应该培养自己，具有放弃私人利益以公共利益为先的高尚品格。(舍己为公)

sentence: 家里破产了——我父亲因为地权的事打了官司，闹得身败名裂
translation_en: Our family went bankrupt - my father got involved in a lawsuit over land rights, causing quite a scandal and ruining his reputation.
translation_zh: 我们家因父亲参与土地权益诉讼而破产，导致了一场大骚动，损害了他的声誉。（身败名裂）

sentence: 这篇散文把桂林山水描写得形象逼真，读完使人有身临其境的感觉
translation_en: This essay vividly depicts the scenery of Guilin, leaving readers with a sense of being immersed in it.
translation_zh: 这篇作文呈现了桂林的风景，使读者感到被它包裹在内。(身临其境)

sentence: 他在任内大施德政，深得人心，因此虽已逝去多年，仍然为人所追思、怀念
translation_en: He was widely admired during his tenure for his benevolent policies, and even though many years have passed since his departure, he is still fondly remembered and thought of.
translation_zh: 他在任期间广泛受到尊敬，因为他的仁政，尽管已经过了许多年，他仍然被珍视和思念。（他深得人心）

sentence: 这篇文章写得深入浅出，使人爱看、易懂
translation_en: This article is engaging and easy to understand.
translation_zh: 这篇文章很有吸引力，深入浅出易于理解。(This article is engaging and easy to understand, with a deep yet shallow understanding.)

sentence: 这篇文章不长，但是论点明确，深中肯綮，有很强的说服力
translation_en: This article may not be long, but its arguments are clear, well-substantiated, and highly persuasive.
translation_zh: 这篇文章可能不长，但其论点清晰、充分证据支持且高度吸引人。（深中肯綮：表示短小的东西却有力而明确的意思）

sentence: 你最近怎么老是神不守舍的
translation_en: You've been acting recklessly lately.
translation_zh: 你近期行事过于奢侈，似乎已经失去了自制力。（神不守舍）

sentence: 自己也觉得仿佛是神来之笔，如用别的韵语形式去写，便决不能有此力量
translation_en: Feels like a divine pen to oneself, unable to muster such power with other verse forms.
translation_zh: 自己感觉像是神来之笔，其他诗式形式无法凭借同样的力量。

sentence: 他回到我母亲身旁，是那么神色张皇
translation_en: He returned to my mother's side with an expression like that of a majestic emperor.
translation_zh: 他回到母亲的身旁，表情像个神色张皇的皇帝。(He returned to my mother's side with an expression like that of a majestic emperor.)

sentence: 这次联欢会的节目安排得非常生动活泼，大家都十分尽兴
translation_en: This time's gathering program is extremely lively and vibrant, everyone is very much enjoying it.
translation_zh: 这次集合活动非常生动活泼，每个人都非常享受中。(This time's gathering activity is extremely lively and vibrant, everyone is enjoying it very much.)

sentence: 改革开放以来，我国的第三产业生机勃勃，发展非常迅速
translation_en: Since the reform and opening up, China's tertiary industry has been vigorous, developing extremely quickly.
translation_zh: 自从改革开放以来，中国的�ertiary 行业生机勃勃地发展，速度非常迅速。(Since the reform and opening up, China's tertiary industry has been vigorous, developing extremely quickly.)

sentence: 他们已有那样的情感，又遇着那些生离死别的事
translation_en: They already have such feelings, and they encounter those separating events again
translation_zh: 他们已经有了这种感情，又再次遇到了分离的事件。(生离死别)

sentence: 现在是总罢工的生死关头，没有时间让你去从容整理
translation_en: The situation is critical for the general strike, there's no time for you to calmly sort things out.
translation_zh: 这场罢工的情况非常危急，你没有时间慢慢处理事情。（生死关头）

sentence: 今日在广场上有数万人参加国庆游行，真是盛况空前
translation_en: There are tens of thousands of people participating in the National Day parade in the square today, an unprecedented scene.
translation_zh: 今天在广场参加国庆大 пара的人数达到了万千，这是一次空前的盛况。(There are tens of thousands of people participating in the National Day parade in the square today, an unprecedented scene.)

sentence: 外国的东西并不是都好，就是那些称之为好的东西中，也有些是盛名难副
translation_en: Not all foreign items are good; among those called 'good', some are hard to live up to their reputation.
translation_zh: 不是所有的外来物品都好，被称为“好”的之中，有些难以与其荣誉相符。(Translation: Not all foreign items are good; among those called 'good', some are hard to live up to their reputation.)

sentence: 朋友们再三要为我饯行，因盛情难却，我只好接受了
translation_en: My friends insisted on sending me off multiple times, due to their enthusiasm it was hard to refuse, so I had to accept it.
translation_zh: 由于朋友们的热情，多次送别我已经无法拒绝，所以只能接受了。(My friends' enthusiasm made it hard for me to refuse being sent off multiple times, so I had to accept it.)

sentence: 经过十几分钟猛烈无情的战斗，早已失魂丧魄的残敌，丢枪弃刀，一个个跪倒在地，举手投降
translation_en: After a fierce and merciless battle lasting over ten minutes, the defeated enemy, already devoid of spirit and will, dropped their guns and swords. One by one, they fell to their knees and surrendered with raised hands.
translation_zh: 在十多分钟的激烈和无情战斗之后，已经失去了精神和意志的败军，放下了枪和剑。逐一跪下并上手投降。这是失魂丧魄的场景。

sentence: 这个倍受战火摧残的小国，的确需要十年生聚，才能谈到复国
translation_en: This war-ravaged small country indeed needs a decade to regroup, before discussing reconstruction.
translation_zh: "这小国因战而废役，需要十年再聚力，才能谈起重建。"

sentence: 新生事物在刚产生时，并不都是十全十美，但总是不断发展壮大，最终是要取代旧事物的
translation_en: New things aren't always perfect when they first emerge, but they continuously develop and grow, eventually replacing old things.
translation_zh: 新事物从出现时就不一定完美，但它们不断发展和成长，最终替代旧事物。这个过程中，它们逐渐变得更好，就像"十全十美"一样。

sentence: 青春时光，有如石火光阴，我们应把握时间多加学习
translation_en: Seize the days of youth, for they pass like fleeting embers and shadows; let us make time for more learning.
translation_zh: 我们应该抓住青春时日，因为像烧尽的Embers和逝去的Shadows一样过得很快；让我们多花些时间在学习上。(Translation: We should seize the days of youth, for they pass quickly like fleeting embers and shadows; let's spend more time on learning.)

sentence: 这项任务十分紧迫，时不我待
translation_en: This task is extremely urgent, there's no time to waste.
translation_zh: 这个任务非常紧急，没有浪费时间的机会，只能立即行动，时不我待。

sentence: 一百多代表中，‘识字知书’的很少，可是穿着倒还不错
translation_en: Few can read and write among more than one hundred generations, but their clothing is still quite good.
translation_zh: 虽然很少有人能在一百代之中读写，但是他们的衣服仍然很好。(Simplified Chinese)

sentence: 我们每个人都应从小养成拾金不昧的好品德
translation_en: Everyone should cultivate the good habit of not being averse to picking up money from young.
translation_zh: 从小就要养成不讳吝金的好习惯。(From small, should cultivate not be averse to picking up money.)

sentence: 如果不用辩证唯物主义观点去研究古代文化遗产，就会食古不化
translation_en: If we do not study ancient cultural heritage using the dialectical materialism perspective, it will result in not assimilating the past but rather consuming it without transformation.
translation_zh: 如果我们没有从方言材料主义的角度学习古代文化遗产，就会导致吸收而不化，这意味着只是消费而不是转变。(食古不化)

sentence: 你们食言而肥，不承认这个原来答应承认的区域
translation_en: You've spoken with food on your lips, yet refuse to acknowledge the agreed-upon region.
translation_zh: 你说的话中有食言，却不愿承认已经确定的地区。(You've spoken with food on your lips, yet refuse to acknowledge the agreed-upon region. With the idiom "食言而肥" integrated naturally into the sentence.)

sentence: 对于他所犯的罪行，他矢口否认
translation_en: He vehemently denies the crimes he committed.
translation_zh: 他坚决否认自己提交的罪行。(He vehemently denies the crimes he committed.)

sentence: 虽然人证物证俱在，他还是矢口狡赖
translation_en: Despite having both physical evidence and witnesses, he still evaded responsibility.
translation_zh: 尽管有物证和目击者，他仍然逃避了责任，就像矢口狡赖一样。(Despite having both physical evidence and witnesses, he still evaded responsibility, just like fox guarding the henhouse.)

sentence: 他是以这样的精神品质来矢志不移地为人民服务
translation_en: He is resolutely dedicated to serving the people with such a character quality.
translation_zh: 他坚定地为人民服务，就像矢志不移一样。(He resolutely serves the people, just like one who does not shift his resolve.)

sentence: 你不要以世俗之见衡量穷人，以为他们一点骨气也没有
translation_en: You should not judge the poor with a worldly perspective, thinking they have no backbone at all.
translation_zh: 你应该不要以世俗之见看待贫穷的人，认为他们根本没有骨气。

sentence: 在这儿，在这世外桃源的仙境中，有了人世喧嚣的声音
translation_en: In this place, amidst the tranquil paradise of Peach Blossom Spring, there emerged sounds of worldly clamor
translation_zh: 这里出现了世外桃源中的喧闹声，即使是在和平的杏花源中也不能逃脱世俗之声。(In this place, even amidst the tranquil paradise of Peach Blossom Spring, one cannot escape the clamor of the world.)

sentence: 如能善用他的特长和经验，比较地容易获得事半功倍的效果
translation_en: If you can effectively utilize his strengths and experience, it will be relatively easier to achieve double the results with half the effort.
translation_zh: 如果你能够有效地利用他的优势和经验，那么就可以相对容易地实现两倍的成果只需要一半的努力。（事半功倍）

sentence: 不料后来事与愿违，现在这点局面小得很，应酬不开
translation_en: Unforeseen events turned out contrary to our wishes, and the situation is quite small now, but the celebration hasn't been opened.
translation_zh: 不料事情发生了反常的变化，并且现在状况已经小了很多，但是庆祝会还没有开放。(事与愿违)

sentence: 这场比赛对阵的双方势均力敌，最终以平局收场
translation_en: This match ended in a draw as both teams were evenly matched.
translation_zh: 这场比赛结束时两队都是平手，势均力敌。(This match ended in a draw as both teams were evenly matched.)

sentence: 对敌人采用的反动的新原则视若无睹
translation_en: Overlooking the reactionary new principles used against enemies as if unseen
translation_zh: 反对敌人的反动新原则，似乎没有看见。(视若无睹)

sentence: 这样看来，邮递这条路是要断绝了，刊物也就不免寿终正寝了
translation_en: This appears to mean that the postal service along this route will be discontinued, and the publication will inevitably cease to exist.
translation_zh: 由于这条邮政路线停运，出版物必然会消失无踪。这就像是人到了终老的时刻，安稳地入眠一样。（寿终正寝）

sentence: 这次，这只瘦骨嶙峋的黑狗的干嗥竟然使形神枯槁的老马也竖了一下耳朵
translation_en: The skinny, bony black dog's bark surprised even the dried-up old horse, causing it to perk up its ears.
translation_zh: 瘦骨嶙峋的黑色狗吠声使老马震惊，甚至睁开了耳朵。

sentence: 她每天一想到自己出身于书香门第，哥哥是个举人，却落入贼人之手，已够丢尽了祖宗的人
translation_en: She thinks every day about how she comes from a family of scholars, her brother was a notable figure, yet he fell into the hands of criminals, bringing shame upon our ancestors.
translation_zh: 她每天都在思考，自己来自一家文豪，兄弟是一位著名人物，却遭到犯罪者的手下，给祖先带来了丢脸。她就像书香门第那样，出身优秀，但因为坏运气而陷入困境。(She is like someone from a scholarly family, with excellent origins, but who has fallen into trouble due to bad luck – "book fragrance door first")

sentence: 我想熟门熟路，比生手实在好得多
translation_en: I prefer familiarity, it's much better than learning by doing.
translation_zh: 学习比做更好，但我宁愿选择熟悉，因为熟门熟路。(Learning is better than doing, but I prefer familiarity because it's like treading a well-known path.)

sentence: 对于损坏公物的现象，我们决不能熟视无睹
translation_en: We must not turn a blind eye to instances of damaged public property.
translation_zh: 我们必须认真面对公共财产被破坏的情况，不能熟视无睹。(We must not turn a blind eye to instances of damaged public property.)

sentence: 我们从小就应树立远大理想，努力学习科学知识，决不做鼠目寸光的庸人
translation_en: We should establish lofty ideals from a young age, strive to learn scientific knowledge, and never become short-sighted common people.
translation_zh: 从小就应该培养高远的理想，学习科学知识，永不成为短视的普通人。这就像是“鼠目寸光”一样，永远保持广阔的视野。

sentence: 如果有了正确的理论，只是把它空谈一阵，束之高阁，并不实行，那么，这种理论再好也是没有意义的
translation_en: If you have the correct theory but only talk about it without implementing it, keeping it high up in the tower, then such a theory, no matter how good, is meaningless.
translation_zh: 如果你拥有正确的理论，但只是在谈论而不实施，将它留在塔顶上，那么这个理论，无论多好，都没有意义。 bundle high tower (bundle之高阁)

sentence: 再者树大招风，土地、山峦多了容易显眼，惹人反对
translation_en: The tall trees attracting wind, with more land and mountain ranges becoming noticeable, will likely draw opposition from people.
translation_zh: 树大招风，高山出水，引起人们的反对。(Tall trees attracting wind, mountains emerging with water, drawing opposition from people.)

sentence: 我们要重视中国历史知识的学习，免得出现数典忘祖的笑话
translation_en: We should take Chinese history seriously to avoid jokes like "forgetting classics and losing our ancestors."
translation_zh: 必须认真学习中国历史，以免陷入“数典忘祖”的嘲讽之中。

sentence: 这种谣言，在各处所发生的真数见不鲜了
translation_en: This rumor is no longer frequently encountered in various places.
translation_zh: 这种谣言已经在各处不再频繁地出现。（这种谣言已经数见不鲜了。）

sentence: 毕业大家自然都盼望的，但一到毕业，却又有些爽然若失
translation_en: Anticipated by everyone upon graduation, but once graduated, there's a sense of relief yet somehow lost
translation_zh: 毕业之后，虽有大家的预期，但是却感到一种吓人又无法抓住的松懈。(Anticipated by everyone upon graduation, but once graduated, there's a sense of relief yet somehow lost; Idiom: 爽然若失)

sentence: 水火无情，我们都应该提高防范意识
translation_en: We should all raise our awareness of prevention.
translation_zh: 我们都应该提高防范的警觉，水火无情地。(We should all raise our awareness of prevention, water and fire have no mercy.)

sentence: 事情这样做顺理成章，既解决了问题，又受到群众的拥护
translation_en: This course of action is logical and appropriate, resolving the issue while also gaining public support.
translation_zh: 这个行动是顺理成章的，解决问题同时也获得了公众支持。(This course of action is logical and appropriate, resolving the issue while also gaining public support. It follows the idiom "顺理成章", which means everything happens logically and appropriately.)

sentence: 两个星期来形势的发展真如天际风云，瞬息万变，表现了一个历史转折时期特有的复杂关系
translation_en: The situation over the past two weeks has developed like changing skies and winds, with sudden shifts, reflecting the complex relationships unique to a period of historical turning points.
translation_zh: 过去两周的情况，就像瞬息万变的天气，突然变化，反映了历史转折点时期独特的关系复杂性。(The situation over the past two weeks has developed like changing skies and winds, with sudden shifts, reflecting the complex relationships unique to a period of historical turning points. Like changing skies and winds.)

sentence: 这只南瓜重达２００余斤，真是硕大无朋
translation_en: This watermelon weighs approximately 200 pounds, truly massive.
translation_zh: 这个西瓜近似于200斤，实在是非常硕大。(This watermelon is approximately 200 pounds, it's truly massive.)

sentence: 完全应当罢课抗议！真是斯文扫地
translation_en: It is completely appropriate to protest by striking school! Indeed, it's quite civilized to sweep the floor.
translation_zh: 学校上 strike 是完全适当的抗议方式，实际上，这种抗议方式也很文明，就像在扫地一样。（斯文扫地）

sentence: 我们为人民而死，就是死得其所
translation_en: We die for the people, that is dying for what we deserve
translation_zh: 我们为人民牺牲，那就是我们应有的命运。（死得其所）

sentence: 每个人都应有自尊心人家不给你，你不要死皮赖脸地去要
translation_en: Everyone should have self-respect, if others don't give it to you, don't act stubbornly to demand it.
translation_zh: 每个人都应该自尊自爱，如果他人没有给你，不要坚持地要求。但是，不能因为这样就显得傲慢和挑剔。（死皮赖脸）

sentence: 我们是四海为家的，我们是以一切人民为兄弟姐妹的
translation_en: We are a family of four seas, we are a family of all mankind.
translation_zh: 我们就像是四海为家的一家人，我们就像是所有人类的一家人。(We are like a family of four seas, just like a family of all mankind.)

sentence: 是给历史以一定的科学的地位，是尊重历史的辩证法的发展，而不是颂古非今，不是赞扬任何封建的毒素
translation_en: It is to give history a certain scientific position, it is the dialectical development of respect for history, not glorifying the past at the expense of the present, not praising any reactionary ideology.
translation_zh: 尊重历史的方式，不是夸大过去，也不是为现在贬低，而是给历史赋予了一定的科学地位，这就是颂古非今的 dialectical development。

sentence: 酸甜苦辣，各种滋味搅和在一起，索性任情地倾吐
translation_en: Sour, sweet, bitter, spicy, various flavors are mixed together, so I let out my feelings freely
translation_zh: 我因为各种味道混杂而自在地表达情感，就像酸甜苦辣一样。(I express my feelings freely, just like various flavors being mixed together.)

sentence: 我们二人并坐，随心所欲的漫谈
translation_en: We two chat freely as we sit together.
translation_zh: 我们两个就坐在一起，随心所欲地聊天。(We two just sit together, chatting freely according to our hearts' desires.)

sentence: 一般农副产品的购销，可随行就市，灵活经营
translation_en: Common agricultural and sideline products can be sold on the spot, operating flexibly
translation_zh: 随行就市的农业和家庭辅助产品可以在现场自由交易。(Simplified Chinese: 随行就市的农业和家庭辅助产品可以在现场自由交易。)

sentence: 凡有损人利己之心的人，其结果都不妙
translation_en: Those with self-interested hearts that harm others will not fare well.
translation_zh: 损人利己的心，不会有好下场。(Those with self-interested hearts that harm others will not have a good ending.)

sentence: 现在依旧是那些红缎对联，那些题款，但当他凝神望定它们的时候，他的兴致却索然寡味了
translation_en: His interest waned somewhat as he focused his gaze on those red couplets and titles.
translation_zh: 他的兴趣有所淡化，当他注意到那些红色诗联和标题时。他的心情似乎变得寂静了些，就像"索然寡味"一样。

sentence: 他嘻嘻笑着，让酒让菜，谈笑风生，又谈起他的山林生活
translation_en: He laughed cheerfully, toasting with wine and dishes, chatting and laughing, then talking about his life in the mountains and forests again.
translation_zh: 他欢笑地喝了一杯酒，并且分享了食物，在聊天和笑声中愉快地通话，然后再次谈论他在山林中的生活。这时候，气氛中就像是谈笑风生了一样。(Tán xìaofēngshēng)

sentence: 一点小事，如探囊取物
translation_en: A trifling matter, like rummaging through a bag for items
translation_zh: 这些小事情，就像在挖包找东西一样。(Exact translation: These trivial matters are like rummaging through a bag for items)

sentence: 坐在一排一排的矮椅上，和跪下的样子也差不多，大家便实行马虎主义，还是堂而皇之地坐着
translation_en: Sitting on rows of low chairs, they also resemble those kneeling down, everyone then practiced sloppy workmanship, yet still maintaining an air of grandeur while seated.
translation_zh: 每个人在低凳上坐着，似乎也像跪下的人一样，他们都表现出粗工的态度，但仍然保持了一个高大上的气氛，坐在那里。(堂而皇之)

sentence: 一些意志薄弱的人容易被糖衣炮弹所击倒
translation_en: Some weak-willed people can easily be toppled by sugarcoated bullets.
translation_zh: 弱智人士很容易被糖衣炮弹拔腿而倒下。

sentence: 你犯下了如此滔天大罪，将难逃法律的严厉制裁
translation_en: You have committed such an immense crime, it will be hard to escape the harsh penalties of the law.
translation_zh: 你所做的这样巨大的罪行，难以逃脱法律的厉害惩罚。（滔天大罪）

sentence: 撞人者逃之夭夭，众人向他投去愤怒的眼光
translation_en: Whoever bumps into someone flees in panic, and the crowd glares at him with anger.
translation_zh: 遇到人就慌张逃跑，那个人被群众瞪得生气了。

sentence: 这简直不是马，是一条腾云驾雾的白龙！一条白龙
translation_en: This is not a horse, it's a white dragon soaring through clouds! A white dragon
translation_zh: 这不是一匹马，而是在云中飞翔的白龙！白龙就是腾云驾雾。

sentence: 他就静悄悄地看下去，看到把各种责难都驳斥得体无完肤之后，他又低声念起来
translation_en: He quietly watches on, after dismissing all sorts of reproaches with grace, he whispers to himself again.
translation_zh: 他悄悄地观察着，顾及各种责备都用优雅的方式回应，再次自言自语。体无完肤，这意味着他没有任何不足之处，即使面临困难也能保持冷静和自信。

sentence: 改革开放以来，我国农村发生了天翻地覆的变化
translation_en: Since the reform and opening up, there has been a drastic change in China's rural areas.
translation_zh: 自从改革开放以来，中国农村发生了天翻地覆的变化。(Since the reform and opening up, there has been a drastic change in China's rural areas like heaven turning over and earth shaking.)

sentence: 学好科学文化知识是每个学生天经地义的事
translation_en: It is essential for every student to learn scientific culture knowledge.
translation_zh: 每个学生都需要学习科学文化知识，这是天经地义。(Every student needs to learn scientific culture knowledge; this is a matter of heaven and earth.)

sentence: 这时父亲如果能够保持着相当丰裕的收入，家中当然充满一片天伦之乐
translation_en: If the father can maintain a substantial income at this time, the home will certainly be filled with a piece of heavenly bliss.
translation_zh: 如果父亲现在能维持一个较大的收入，那么家就会充满天伦之乐。(If the father can maintain a substantial income at this time, the home will certainly be filled with the joy of heavenly harmony.)

sentence: 按照一般人的生理机能来说，聪明与不聪明虽有差别，但并不存在天壤之别
translation_en: According to general physiological abilities, intelligence may vary, but it does not imply an insurmountable difference.
translation_zh: 根据一般生理能力的差异，智商可能会有所不同，但这并不意味着无法克服巨大的差距。（天壤之别）

sentence: 这篇文章立意明确，论述周到、深刻，真可谓天衣无缝
translation_en: This article is clearly stated with a clear intention, comprehensive and profound, truly seamless like heaven's robe.
translation_zh: 这篇文章清晰地表达，内容广博深奥，实在像天衣无缝一样流畅。(This article is clearly stated with a clear intention, comprehensive and profound, truly seamless like heaven's robe.)

sentence: 有人能增加些美到世上去，这人便是天之骄子
translation_en: Whoever can add some beauty to the world, that person is indeed a proud son of heaven
translation_zh: 谁能为世界添加一些美丽，那个人就是真正的天之骄子。(Translation: Whoever can add some beauty to the world, that person is indeed a proud son of heaven)

sentence: 说话爱添枝接叶的人，是不诚实的人
translation_en: Dishonest people are those who speak as if they're adding branches to grow more leaves.
translation_zh: 谎言说出来就像在添枝接叶，这些人是诚信不足的。(Literally: Speaking falsehoods is like adding branches to grow more leaves; these people lack integrity.)

sentence: 我们要学好本领，将来为祖国建设添砖加瓦
translation_en: We should master our skills to lay bricks and tiles for building our nation in the future.
translation_zh: 我们应当掌握技能，为将来建国打砖墙加瓦。(We should master our skills to build the wall brick by brick and tile by tile for our future nation.)

sentence: 数十载的监牢生涯，使他遍尝铁窗风味
translation_en: He experienced the taste of prison life for several decades.
translation_zh: 他几十年来，就像受到了铁窗风味一样，在狱中生活过了。(He lived in prison for several decades, as if he had tasted the flavor of iron bars.)

sentence: 我们应当与命运抗争，而不应听天由命地生活
translation_en: We should strive against fate, rather than live passively according to it.
translation_zh: 我们应该努力与命运斗争，而不是被它所定性。（听天由命）

sentence: 不要把他逼上绝路，否则他会挺而走险的
translation_en: Don't push him into a dead end, or else he will take dangerous risks.
translation_zh: 不要将他推向死胡同，否则他会踏入危险之路。(Don't push him into a dead end, or else he will take dangerous risks.)

sentence: 我自然爱我的弟弟，我们原是同气连枝的
translation_en: I naturally love my younger brother, we were originally like branches of the same tree.
translation_zh: 我和弟弟自然喜欢，就像是同气连枝的树枝一样。(I naturally love my younger brother, just like branches of the same tree with connected spirits.)

sentence: 一对同生共死的战友，肩并着肩；火热的手，紧紧地握在一起
translation_en: Two comrades-in-arms, bound by life and death, shoulder to shoulder; their hands, tightly clasped together in warmth.
translation_zh: 两位同志，生死相依，肩肩并进；手紧紧握在一起，充满温暖。(同生共死)

sentence: 只要我们大家同心协力，就没有克服不了的困难
translation_en: As long as we all work together with unity, there's no insurmountable difficulty.
translation_zh: 只要我们一起以团结工作，就没有无法克服的困难。(同心协力)

sentence: 国家利益、集体利益、个人利益要三者统筹兼顾才行
translation_en: Balancing national interest, collective interest, and individual interest is key.
translation_zh: 统筹兼顾国家利益、集体利益和个人利益是关键。(Balancing national interest, collective interest, and individual interest is key.)

sentence: 我怎能忍心告诉他，使这个老人痛哭流涕呢
translation_en: I couldn't bear to tell him, making that old man weep bitterly.
translation_zh: 我无法告诉他，使那位老人哭得流泪如雨。(I couldn't bear to tell him, causing that old man to cry bitterly.)

sentence: 他所玩弄的偷天换日的鬼把戏，早被大家识破了
translation_en: The trick of time swindling that he was playing with has been exposed by everyone.
translation_zh: 他的时间欺骗之技巧已经被每个人都发现了。（偷天换日）

sentence: 你若在继续顽抗下去，必定会碰得头破血流
translation_en: If you persist in being obstinate, you will surely suffer severe injuries.
translation_zh: 坚持不懈地冒犯，必定会遭受重大伤害。(头破血流)

sentence: 学习要勤奋刻苦，踏踏实实，不能靠投机取巧取得成功
translation_en: Study requires diligence and hard work, step by step, success cannot be achieved through speculation.
translation_zh: 学习需要勤奋和辛勤，步步漫长，只有通过努力才能实现成功，不能通过投机取巧。(Translation: Study requires diligence and hard work, step by step, only through effort can success be achieved, not through speculation.)

sentence: 草野朋友，没有什么政治的约束，平时追逐酒肉，事情一来，就投井下石
translation_en: Friends from the countryside, there are no political constraints, they usually chase food and drink, when something happens, they throw stones into wells
translation_zh: 乡村朋友，政治限制不存在，他们通常追逐食物和酒水，有事发生时就会投井下石。

sentence: 他的身上是带着有我们的盘费的，那两名轿夫不会图财害命吗
translation_en: He has our tip on him, won't those two coachmen risk their lives for money?
translation_zh: 他在我们的指教下，那两个车夫为钱不惜危险吗？（图财害命）

sentence: 妙用岂是人人都能够了解的，向他们辩白，也不过徒费唇舌，不如省些精神罢
translation_en: It is not something that everyone can understand easily, arguing with them would only waste breath, better save some energy.
translation_zh: 这些事情不是每个人都能轻易理解的，与他们争论只会浪费口气，更好地节省一点力量。（徒费唇舌）

sentence: 做事要讲效益，徒劳无益的事不要去做
translation_en: Do beneficial things, avoid doing useless tasks.
translation_zh: 做有益的事情，避免徒劳无益的任务。(Do beneficial things, avoid doing useless tasks.)

sentence: 我照作品的年月看下去，这些不肯涂脂抹粉的青年们的魂灵便依次屹立在我眼前
translation_en: As I look at the works with their months, the spirits of those unyielding young men who refuse to apply makeup or powder stand successively before me.
translation_zh: 每看到这些作品，与它们的月份相伴，那些不屈的年轻男子，不愿涂脂抹粉的精神，一个接一个地站在我面前。

sentence: 做学问必须下一番推本溯源的功夫
translation_en: One must put in considerable effort to delve deeply into the roots of classical studies.
translation_zh: 必须投入大量努力，深入古学的根源。(推本溯源)

sentence: 同学之间应该推诚相见
translation_en: Peers should extend invitations to each other to meet.
translation_zh: 每位同伴应该互相发出邀请，以便相互交流。(推诚相见)

sentence: 至于新作，现在可是难了，较好的简直无处发表，但若做得吞吞吐吐，自己又觉无聊
translation_en: Regarding the new work, it's become difficult now, truly excellent pieces seem to have no outlet, but if one manages to produce it piece by piece, it feels dull for oneself.
translation_zh: 新工作上，现在真的很难了，似乎没有出路，但是逐渐完成它，自己感觉很无趣。这时候就需要吞吞吐吐地坚持下去。(Translation: In the new work, it has become very difficult now, there seems to be no outlet, but if one persists in completing it bit by bit, it feels dull for oneself. At this time, one needs to persevere with gritted teeth.)

sentence: 经过艰苦努力，他的学习成绩终于在全班脱颖而出
translation_en: Through hard work, his academic performance finally stood out among the class.
translation_zh: 通过努力，他的学习表现终于在班级中脱颖而出了。

sentence: 早应当整整社员里头的歪风邪气了
translation_en: Membership should have already cleared out all the deviant winds and harmful air within the organization.
translation_zh: 会员应该已经吹走了组织内的歪风邪气。(Membership should have already blown away the deviant winds and harmful air within the organization.)

sentence: 我们要想办法，让大家都富起来，但是决不能搞歪门邪道
translation_en: Let's find ways to make everyone prosper, but under no circumstances should we resort to crooked means.
translation_zh: 我们应该找到使每个人繁荣的方法，但绝不能走歪门邪道。

sentence: 请放心，不要多久，这两件东西定会完璧归赵
translation_en: Rest assured, it won't take long before these two things are perfectly returned to Zhao.
translation_zh: 无需担心，这两件事很快就会完美地回到赵家了。(完璧归赵)

sentence: 世界上根本不存在完美无缺的东西
translation_en: There is no perfect thing in the world without flaw.
translation_zh: 世界上没有完美无缺的事情。(World has no perfect things without flaw.)

sentence: 由于他玩忽职守，结果给单位造成巨大的经济损失
translation_en: Due to his neglect of duty, the organization suffered enormous economic losses.
translation_zh: 由于他的职责荒废，组织遭受了巨大经济损失。（因为他的职责荒废，组织遭受了巨大经济损失） = Because of his negligence of duty, the organization suffered enormous economic losses. (playing negligent of one's duties)

sentence: 那声音大概是横笛，宛转悠扬
translation_en: That sounds like an oboe, resonant and lyrical
translation_zh: 这听起来像是一个笛子，充满耐人寻味和流溢的音色。（该句话中使用了“宛转悠扬”）

sentence: 签后当日送出，我回家时已经万家灯火了
translation_en: Sent out the day after signing, all homes were already lit by the time I got home.
translation_zh: 签字之日就发出去，我回到家时所有家庭都已经点亮了。

sentence: 倘使连这一点反抗心都没有，岂不就成为万劫不复的奴才了
translation_en: If there's no resistance at all, wouldn't one become an eternal slave?
translation_zh: 如果没有任何阻力，一直都会成为永恒的奴隶吗？

sentence: 这时万籁俱寂，只听到滴搭的钟声和可以微闻得到的母亲的呼吸
translation_en: It's quiet at this time, only the sound of dripping water from the clock and faint breaths of the mother can be heard.
translation_zh: 这时只有水滴声和母亲微弱的呼吸能听到，整个场合似乎都变得了万籁俱寂。(The entire scene seems to have become silent like the idiom "wan er ju ji.")

sentence: 历代圣贤或立功、或立言、或立德，而永为万流景仰
translation_en: Ancient sages either achieved deeds, or spoke words, or demonstrated virtues, and have always been admired by countless generations.
translation_zh: 古代贤士， Either 成就事业，或发表言论，或展示德行，都被无数世代所崇拜。这些人的行为和言论，永远是众多年代的模范。（Wan liu jing yang）

sentence: 乡村里没有警察，没有宪兵，没有被捕的危险。即便有，在高粱地里一藏，万事大吉
translation_en: In the village, there is no police, no soldiers, no danger of being arrested. Even if there were, hidden among the rice paddies, all would go well.
translation_zh: 在村子里，没有警察、没有兵士，也没有被抓的危险。即使有，隐藏在米田中，一切都会顺利。这就像是万事大吉一样。(In the village, there's no police, no soldiers, no risk of being arrested. Even if there were, hidden among the rice paddies, everything would go well. It's like having everything turn out well.)

sentence: 他们预备散到各地去，把万万千千的心团结成一颗心呀
translation_en: They prepare to disperse to various places, uniting countless hearts into one heart.
translation_zh: 他们准备分散到各处，将万万千千的心合为一。(They prepare to disperse to various places, uniting countless hearts into one heart.)

sentence: 他激动地铺开稿纸，提笔写下了小说的题目，便汪洋恣肆地写起来
translation_en: He excitedly unfolds the paper, picks up a pen to write down the title of the novel, and then writes wildly.
translation_zh: 他兴奋地展开了纸张，捡起笔记下小说的标题，然后狂写。汪洋恣肆地作文。

sentence: 加上他那黑而峻厉的面孔，颇使我望而生畏
translation_en: His intimidating, dark countenance instills fear within me.
translation_zh: 他凌厉的黑色脸孔使我感到惊怕。（他望而生畏）

sentence: 家长要有望子成龙的愿望，更要有培养和教育孩子成材的行动
translation_en: Parents should have the wish for their child to become like Bruce Lee, moreover, they should take action to nurture and educate their child to develop good character.
translation_zh: 父母应该愿望孩子成为像李小龍一样的好人，同时也要采取行动，培养和教育孩子，�ultivate good character.

sentence: 当这个危急存亡，不顾性命的时候，还不振作起精神来，一致对外吗
translation_en: In times of existential crisis, when disregard for one's life prevails, is everyone still consistent in their external behavior?
translation_zh: 危急时刻，生命无所顾忌，每个人都还是在外表上保持一致吗？(In times of existential crisis, when disregard for one's life prevails, is everyone still consistent in their external behavior?)

sentence: 危迫利诱不能动摇一个爱国志士的坚强意志
translation_en: An imminent temptation cannot shake the firm resolve of a patriotic official.
translation_zh: 危迫利诱无法动摇忠 Patriotic officials cannot be shaken by imminent temptation and pressure.

sentence: 快呀，请指示我！莫要为德不卒
translation_en: Hurry up, show me the way! Don't underestimate me!
translation_zh: 请赶快带我走，不要轻视我！为德不卒。(Please hurry up and show me the way! Don't underestimate me! Never underestimate one's virtue.)

sentence: 请你作出明确的回答，不要唯唯否否
translation_en: Please give a clear answer, not just yes or no.
translation_zh: 请给出明确的回答，而不是简单地点头或摇头。（唯唯否否）

sentence: 这幅画把儿童天真活泼的神态描绘得惟肖惟妙
translation_en: This painting beautifully captures the innocent and lively demeanor of children.
translation_zh: 这幅画精美地捕捉了孩子们的天真生动之色，就像惟肖惟妙一样。(This painting beautifully captures the innocent and lively demeanor of children, just like the idiom "惟肖惟妙".)

sentence: 我们应该扫除这里的萎靡不振之风，好好地大干一场
translation_en: We should sweep away this stagnant air, let's do a thorough job of it.
translation_zh: 我们应该清除这些滞水的空气，让我们做一个彻底的工作。(We should sweep away this stagnant air, let's do a thorough job of it.)

sentence: 事情还在未定之天，你们忙些啥
translation_en: What are you busy with, given that the situation is still undecided?
translation_zh: 你正在做什么，因为情况还没有决定吗？这时候就像是未定之天了。(Answering the question and integrating the idiom "未定之天" into the sentence)

sentence: 温故知新是学习上的重要方法
translation_en: Familiarizing oneself with the old leads to new insights, which is an important method of learning.
translation_zh: 温故知新是学习的重要方法。(Familiarizing oneself with the old leads to new insights is an important method of learning.)

sentence: 尽管外面闹翻了天，他在屋里仍然文风不动，照旧读他的书
translation_en: Despite the uproar outside, he remained undisturbed inside, still reading his books as usual.
translation_zh: 尽管外面有噪音，他在内部依然平静，正如常样地阅读着书。（文风不动）

sentence: 其实错了就老实自己承认，倒是精神安泰的事情；文过饰非是最苦痛的勾当
translation_en: Admitting one's mistake is honest, mental health issues are rather something to be dealt with; hypocrisy is the most painful deception.
translation_zh: 承认错误是诚实，心理健康问题需要处理，假装是最痛苦的虚伪。

sentence: 很难想象，有的人连写信都文理不通，怎么能准确、简炼、明白地写出科学论文呢
translation_en: It's hard to imagine that some people can't even write coherently, let alone compose scientific papers accurately, concisely, and clearly.
translation_zh: 即使某些人写不起连贯的文章，也难以想象他们能够准确、简洁、清晰地编写科学论文。这种情况下，“文理不通”是一个适当的描述。(文理不通)

sentence: 文人墨客大概是感性太锐敏了之故罢，向来就很娇气，什么也给他说不得，见不得，听不得，想不得
translation_en: Sensitive and quick-witted scholars or writers are probably too emotional, who have always been rather delicate, cannot be spoken to about anything, seen by anyone, heard by anyone, or thought of by anyone.
translation_zh: 敏感快悟的文人墨客，可能因为太情绪化，一直很脆弱，不能被任何人说、看、听、想。

sentence: 决不能让文人无行的现象继续存在
translation_en: Cannot allow the phenomenon of literati without action to continue.
translation_zh: 文人无行的现象不能长期持续。(Literati without action's phenomenon cannot be long-term sustained.)

sentence: 那是难得的一位文武全才啦
translation_en: That's a rare individual with both literary and military talents.
translation_zh: 这个人具有文武双全的特殊天赋。(This person has the special gift of both literary and military talents.)

sentence: 他的个性闻融敦厚，因此许多人乐于与他相交为友
translation_en: He has a warm and generous personality, so many people are willing to interact with him as friends.
translation_zh: 他具有温暖而大方的性格，因此许多人愿意以朋友的身份与他交流。(他听说融敦厚)

sentence: 怎么受压？嘿，说起来叫人窝火憋气呗
translation_en: How are you feeling pressured? Hey, it's like people bottling up their anger, isn't it?
translation_zh: "你感觉压力很大吗？好像人们都在囊囊藏怒，不是吗？"

sentence: 中国足球要想冲出亚洲，必须卧薪尝胆，刻苦训练
translation_en: To break out of Asia in football, one must endure hardship and train rigorously.
translation_zh: 要在足球中从亚洲出发，必须坚持苦难和努力训练。卧薪尝胆。

sentence: 在这种乌七八糟的地方，好人也会变坏
translation_en: Kind people can also become corrupt in such a chaotic place.
translation_zh: 在这种混乱的地方，好人也有可能变得腐败。（乌七八糟）

sentence: 山路通过涧上一座毛竹小桥，重又隐没到无边无际的大竹林里了
translation_en: The path goes over a small bamboo bridge upstream through a gully, and then disappears again into an endless sea of large bamboos.
translation_zh: 小竹桥上，通过岔口经过，然后消失在无数大竹子中的路径，似乎永远地陷入无边无际的竹林之中。

sentence: 回到故乡之后，又受着轻蔑、排斥、迫害，几乎无地可容
translation_en: Returning to my hometown, I was met with scorn, rejection, and persecution, barely finding a place to fit in.
translation_zh: 回到故乡，我被嘲笑、驳回和迫害，几乎找不到适合的地方。这时候，无地可容了。(Translation: Upon returning to my hometown, I was met with scorn, rejection, and persecution, barely finding a place to fit in. At that point, there was no room for me.)

sentence: 面对集体财产遭到大火的威胁，我们怎么能无动于衷呢
translation_en: How can we remain unmoved when collective property is threatened by a great fire?
translation_zh: 当集体财产面临大火威胁时，我们就无法保持冷静。(当然，这里使用了“无动于衷”的意思)

sentence: 事关公司的财务机密，因此无可奉告
translation_en: This concerns the financial secrets of the company, therefore, I cannot disclose anything.
translation_zh: 由于这涉及到公司的财务秘密，因此我无法透露任何信息。(This is concerned with the financial secrets of the company, thus I cannot disclose anything.)

sentence: 作者的动机无可厚非，但客观效果则不尽符合作者的动机
translation_en: The author's motivation is beyond reproach, but the objective results do not fully meet the author's expectations.
translation_zh: 作者的动机无可厚非，但结果并不能完全满足作者的期望。(The author's motivation is beyond reproach, but the results do not fully meet the author's expectations.)

sentence: 对那些无理取闹的人，我们决不应该迁就
translation_en: We should not yield to those who make a fuss without reason.
translation_zh: 无需为无理取闹的人屈服。(We should not yield to those who make a fuss without reason.)

sentence: 无米之炊，是人力所做不到的
translation_en: Impossible to do without rice.
translation_zh: 无法做 без米，即是无米之炊。(This translates to "Impossible to do without rice" using the given Chinese idiom integrated into the sentence.)

sentence: 海底世界无奇不有，光是已知的动物就有三万多种
translation_en: The deep sea is full of wonders, with more than 30,000 known species of animals alone.
translation_zh: 海底有数，无奇不有各种动物已知上千种。(The sea has its depths, there's no wonder without it; various animals already have more than ten thousand kinds.)

sentence: 我还要去找找经理，我请他答应在报上公布出来。我就怕他们蒙住搞，无声无臭就把你干了
translation_en: I still need to speak with the manager, asking him to announce it in the newspaper. I'm afraid they will secretly do something to you without anyone knowing.
translation_zh: 我还需要与经理交谈，让他在报纸上公布，怕他们会秘密地做些什么你，而没有人知道。但是，我们必须小心，因为“无声无臭”的事情最可怕。

sentence: 真理是无所不在的
translation_en: Truth is all-pervasive
translation_zh: 真理无所不在，一切都会被它所涉及。(Truth pervades everything; it will affect everything.)

sentence: 前后不过四五个钟头。却也办得细密周到，无懈可击
translation_en: Less than five hours apart. Yet, it was meticulous and thorough, relentless.
translation_zh: 尽管时间仅差不多五个小时，却是细致而彻底、不断的。

sentence: 这个道理简单明了，无庸赘述
translation_en: This principle is clear and straightforward, there's no need to elaborate further.
translation_zh: 这原则明确而简单，无需再多说什么。(This principle is clear and straightforward; there's no need to say more.)

sentence: 他的力量，力气，一向使他自尊自傲，可是在过去的这些日子，无缘无故的他受尽了委曲与困苦
translation_en: His strength and vigor have always made him arrogant and self-important, but lately, he has been subjected to humiliation and hardship without reason.
translation_zh: 他的强大和壮丽总是让人感觉自得自然，但最近却被无理地辱骂和折磨。这些事情使他变得谦虚了。（无缘无故）

sentence: 我们新时代的青年绝不能做五谷不分的书呆子
translation_en: Our young people in this new era should not become indiscriminate bookworms.
translation_zh: 这一新时代的青年应当避免成为无差别的书呆子，而是要多去体验生活。（五谷不分）

sentence: 一瞬之间，他已被五花大绑起来。粗大的杠子立即压折了他的双腿
translation_en: In an instant, he was tied up with five knots. A large bar immediately bent his legs.
translation_zh: 只需一刹那，他就被五个结绳捆住了，一个大条立刻折断了他的腿。

sentence: 像魔术似地从地下涌出一丛鲜花，五色缤纷，散发出喷鼻的香味
translation_en: Blooms of vibrant flowers burst forth mysteriously from beneath the ground, their colors a riot, emitting a fragrance that's hard to resist.
translation_zh: 五色缤纷地花冒出来，其色震惊，难以抗拒的香气扑鼻而来。(Vibrant flowers with five colors mysteriously burst forth from beneath the ground, their colors shocking, difficult to resist the fragrance.)

sentence: 不是没收吧？又物归原主啦？这可是喜事
translation_en: Isn't it confiscated? The goods have been returned to their original owner, isn't that great news?
translation_zh: 这些商品已经回到了它们的原始所有者手中，那真是好消息！而且，这些商品已被吊销。（物归原主）

sentence: 不料‘思想权威者’或‘思想界先驱者’这一顶‘纸糊的假冠’，竟又是如此误人子弟
translation_en: Unforeseen, the 'thought authority figure' or 'pioneer of thought', surprisingly, misled many.
translation_zh: 不经意间，“思想领袖”或“思想先驱”令人惊异地误导了许多人。(Mistakenly, the "thought leader" or "pioneer of thought", surprisingly, led many astray.)

sentence: 水是生命的源泉，水与生命的起源息息相关
translation_en: Water is the source of life, water and the origin of life are closely related.
translation_zh: 水是生命的源头，水与生命的起源息息相关。

sentence: 水是生命的源泉，水与生命的起源息息相通
translation_en: Water is the source of life, water and the origin of life are closely interconnected.
translation_zh: 水是生命的源头，水与生命的起源紧密相连。（水和生命的起源息息相通）

sentence: 难道你不希望我们中国人的艺术品在外国人眼里被看作稀世之宝吗
translation_en: Doesn't it seem you don't want Chinese art pieces to be regarded as rare treasures by foreigners?
translation_zh: 你不是觉得中国艺术品不应被外国人视为稀世之宝吗？

sentence: 人们熙来攘往地汇集在广场上
translation_en: People gather enthusiastically on the square
translation_zh: 人们在广场上聚集，充满热情地攘往周围。(People gather enthusiastically on the square, spreading out with excitement.)

sentence: 院里的人都熙熙融融地欢喜了一天，现在也沉静了
translation_en: Everyone inside was joyfully bustling for a day, now they have calmed down.
translation_zh: 每个人在内，一天的欢快忙乱后，已经平静了下来。（熙熙融融）

sentence: 班长随又嬉皮笑脸岔了一句
translation_en: The class president chatted briefly, playfully smiling.
translation_zh: 班长嘻哈了一会，嬉皮笑脸地微笑着。

sentence: 这可真叫他喜出望外
translation_en: This really pleases him greatly
translation_zh: 这真的让他非常高兴，令人喜出望外。(This truly delights him greatly, making one feel delighted beyond expectation.)

sentence: 全家人一个个都是喜眉笑眼
translation_en: Everyone in the family is smiling with delight
translation_zh: 每个家人都以喜眉笑眼地笑着。(Everyone in the family is smiling with delight)

sentence: 这是一部很有教育意义、人民群众喜闻乐见的好小说
translation_en: This is a well-liked, educational novel.
translation_zh: 这是一本受欢迎且有教育价值的小说，读起来真是喜闻乐见。(This is a well-liked and educational novel, reading it is truly a pleasure.)

sentence: 想到将与阔别已久的好友相见，他不禁喜溢眉梢
translation_en: He couldn't help but feel a surge of joy at the thought of meeting an old friend he had been apart from for a long time.
translation_zh: 想到再见老友记，他就无法抗拒一股涌动的喜悦。(He could not resist a surging joy upon thinking about seeing his old friends again.)

sentence: 我走上前去，下气怡声提出我的要求，说明我的情况，恳求他们帮忙，能带一带我
translation_en: I walked up to him, spoke out my demands calmly, explained my situation, pleaded with them for help, and asked if they could guide me.
translation_zh: 我走到他面前，平静地表达了我的要求，解释了我的情况，哀求他们帮助，并问他们能否指引我。(下气怡声)

sentence: 你这先礼后兵方法实在高明
translation_en: Your method of bowing first and fighting later is indeed clever
translation_zh: 先礼后兵的方法确实很聪明。(Your method of bowing first and fighting later is indeed clever)

sentence: 他深深懂得先声夺人的道理，就预先做了广告，因此货销售得很快
translation_en: He understood the principle of capturing attention with an initial announcement, so he prepared advertising in advance, hence sales were quick.
translation_zh: 因为他了解了抓住注意力的原则，就在事前准备了广告，所以销售很快。（先声夺人）

sentence: 我不是别人，哪知道别人的意思呢？‘先意承志’的妙法，又未曾学过
translation_en: I am not someone else, how would I know what others mean? The art of 'preconceived intention' is something I have not learned yet.
translation_zh: 我不是其他人，怎么会知道他们的心思？我还没有学会“先意承志”。

sentence: 文艺家先时讲的话，渐渐大家都记起来了，大家都赞成他，恭维他是先知先觉
translation_en: His artistic words from earlier have gradually been remembered by all, everyone agrees with him and praise him as a seer.
translation_zh: 他之前的艺术言论逐渐被所有人记住，每个人都同意与他一致，并将他称为先知。（先知先觉）

sentence: 这家小店老板经常做些衔玉贾石的买卖，以此发财
translation_en: The owner of this small shop often conducts business with jade and agate, thereby amassing wealth.
translation_zh: 这家小店的主人经常与玉和石商量，因此积累了财富。（Translation: This small shop's owner often conducts business with jade and agate, thereby accumulating wealth.）

sentence: 他在池中游泳突然抽搐，险遭不测，幸有旁人相救，方才逃过一劫
translation_en: He suddenly convulsed while swimming in the pool, narrowly escaping danger, fortunately a bystander came to his aid, only then did he manage to escape the peril.
translation_zh: 他在游泳池中突然发作，巧妙地逃脱危险，幸好有一个观众出手，才能逃离危机。(险遭不测)

sentence: 由于对方毫无诚意，使贸易谈判陷入僵局
translation_en: Due to the other party's lack of sincerity, the trade talks have reached an impasse.
translation_zh: 由于对方的不诚实，商谈已经陷入僵局。(Trade talks have reached an impasse due to the other party's lack of sincerity.)

sentence: 这事到时你相机行事，酌情处理吧
translation_en: Handle this matter with discretion when the time comes, okay?
translation_zh: 当时需要保持秘密时，请用相机行事。(When it's time, please handle matters discreetly.)

sentence: 教室里学生们的情绪高涨，歌声响彻云霄
translation_en: The students' emotions are heightened in the classroom, their voices echoing to the heavens.
translation_zh: 在教室中，学生们的情绪激昂，声音反映到天空之上。(The students' emotions are heightened in the classroom, their voices echoing to the heavens. Their emotions resonate to the heavens like the idiom "响彻云霄.")

sentence: 参加的有社友，也有向风慕义来的非社友，共有一百有九人之多
translation_en: More than one hundred and nine people attended, including some members and others who admire our cause.
translation_zh: 一百多个人参加了，包括我们的成员和向风慕义的人也在。(One hundred and more people attended, including our members and those who admire our cause.)

sentence: 我们山里人，小户人家，这算得什么
translation_en: What does it amount to, us being mountain folk with small houses?
translation_zh: 我们为山民，小户人家的地位何在？

sentence: 母亲小心翼翼地起床做饭，心里欣喜地想，让儿子多睡一会，不要惊醒他
translation_en: Mother treads softly to rise, make breakfast, thinking happily for son to sleep longer, not to wake him up.
