translation_zh: 小心翼翼地妈妈慢走，做早餐，想着儿子能多睡一会，不要唤醒他。(Mother walks carefully like a tiptoeing sparrow, makes breakfast, thinks that the son can sleep longer, so as not to wake him up.)

sentence: 这些学生们一天总是那么活泼开朗，笑容可掬
translation_en: These students are always so lively and cheerful, with smiles that radiate.
translation_zh: 这些学生总是如此活泼和欢乐，微笑就像能掏取的东西。(These students are always so lively and cheerful, their smiles can be scooped up.)

sentence: 谢天谢地，这件事总算办成了
translation_en: Thank heaven and earth, this matter has finally been accomplished
translation_zh: 谢天谢地，这件事终于成功了。(Thank heaven and earth, this matter has finally been accomplished)

sentence: 这两个邂逅相遇的老朋友就站在路旁谈了起来
translation_en: These two old friends who happened to meet by chance stood on the sidewalk and started talking.
translation_zh: 两位老友在偶然邂逅时，就站在路边开始聊天。(Two old friends who happen to meet by chance stand on the sidewalk and start talking.)

sentence: 到后来忘却了真,相信了谎,也就心安理得,天趣盎然了起来
translation_en: In time, I forgot the truth, believed the lies, and thus found peace of mind, and my fate brightened up.
translation_zh: 过了时间，我忘记了真相，信以为真，找到了平静的心灵，并且命运逐渐明亮。（心安理得）

sentence: 那美丽如画的山水真让我心驰神往
translation_en: That scenic view of the mountains and waters is truly captivating.
translation_zh: 那个山水景色真是让人心驰神往。(This scenic view of the mountains and waters is truly captivating.)

sentence: 这个人办事一向心慈面软，你尽管放心好了
translation_en: This person is always kind-hearted and gentle when dealing with matters, you can relax now.
translation_zh: 这个人总是心慈面软地处理事情，你现在可以放心了。(This person is always kind-hearted and gentle when dealing with matters, you can relax now.)

sentence: 大家都这么想，这个心腹之患一天不除，就一天不得安宁
translation_en: Everyone feels this way, if this abdominal issue isn't resolved today, there will be no peace tonight.
translation_zh: 如果今天这个腹部问题没有解决，就无法享受今晚的平安。(心腹之患)

sentence: 这件不该发生的事出现了，让他心慌意乱
translation_en: This unexpected event has left him panicked and disoriented.
translation_zh: 这个意外事件使他心慌意乱了。(This unexpected event has left him panicked and disoriented.)

sentence: 我们没有理由因为某一科没考好而悲观失望，心灰意懒
translation_en: We have no reason to be pessimistic and disappointed because we didn't do well in one subject, feeling disheartened and lacking motivation.
translation_zh: 我们没有理由因为在一个学科上表现不好而感到悲观和失望，心灰意懒，丧失动力。(We have no reason to feel disheartened and lacking motivation because we didn't do well in one subject, feeling "heart gray and lazy.")

sentence: 我竟失态到这地步，但我仍然心口不一的
translation_en: I'm astonished that I lost my temper to this extent, but I still feel at odds with myself.
translation_zh: 我讶异地失控到这种程度，但仍然感到自己内心不宁。(心口不一)

sentence: 心口如一，不说假话，这是做人起码应具有的品质
translation_en: Honesty is at least one of the qualities one should possess when dealing with people.
translation_zh: 人与人交往时，必须拥有至少一项诚实之质。心口如一。(Rén yú rén jiāo wǎng shí, bìxū zhīyǒu zàishēng yī xiàng chéngxì zhī zìqì. Xīn kǒu rú yī.)

sentence: 想到这一点，他心乱如麻，一夜都没有合过眼儿
translation_en: He became restless and couldn't sleep, thinking about that point.
translation_zh: 他因为想到那个点而陷入了忐忑不安，就像心乱如麻一样。(He became restless and couldn't sleep, just like his mind is chaotic as a field of millet.)

sentence: 这是一个心直口快，喜欢吵吵闹闹的人
translation_en: This is a straightforward, outspoken person who enjoys being loud and boisterous.
translation_zh: 这个人是一个直言不讳、吼喊大声的人，就像心直口快一样。(This person is straightforward and outspoken, just like someone with a quick tongue.)

sentence: 全班同学欣喜若狂，向取得第一名的同学庆祝
translation_en: The entire class is ecstatic, celebrating with the student who got first place.
translation_zh: 整个班级都欣喜若狂，庆祝了第一名的学生。(The entire class is ecstatic like mad with joy, celebrating the student who got first place.)

sentence: 这样，我们的信而好古的态度，便发生了新意义
translation_en: Our traditional approach has taken on new significance.
translation_zh: "因为传统方法取得了新的意义，我们更愿意追求古老的风格" ("Because our traditional approach has taken on new significance, we are more inclined to pursue the old style") - This sentence incorporates the Chinese idiom "信而好古" (to value tradition) while maintaining its original meaning and context.

sentence: 为顾客提供最佳品质的产品，是这家公司几十年来始终信守不渝的宗旨
translation_en: This company's unwavering principle for several decades has been to provide customers with the highest quality products.
translation_zh: 这家公司几十年来，坚持不渝地为客户提供最高质量的产品。(This company, for several decades, has unwaveringly provided the highest quality products to customers.)

sentence: 他们哪里是来拜望我的呵，他们是来兴师问罪的
translation_en: They came to pay their respects to me, but they were here to seek my advice.
translation_zh: 他们来见我，实际上是为了咨询我的意见。（兴师问罪）

sentence: 这篇文章内容空洞，语言贫乏，读起来使人兴味索然
translation_en: This article is hollow in content, poor in language, reading it leaves one's interest unsatisfied
translation_zh: 这篇文章内容贫乏，语言枯燥，读完后感觉兴趣不足以满足。（这篇文章的兴趣似乎索然无味）

sentence: 全班同学早就集合好，兴致勃勃地向野游地进发了
translation_en: The entire class of students had gathered early, and they enthusiastically advanced towards the wilderness area.
translation_zh: 学生们早就聚集在了野外地区，兴致勃勃地向那里前进。(The entire class of students had gathered early, and they enthusiastically advanced towards the wilderness area.)

sentence: 这是双方的互相倾慕，惺惺相惜，但是，又何尝不是一种缘分呢
translation_en: This is mutual infatuation, cherished and precious, yet isn't it also a kind of fate?
translation_zh: 这是互相喜欢，珍重且珍贵，而不妨也是一种命运吗？

sentence: 贴在教务处骂他的纸条，确有点过火，但也是他形迹可疑所致
translation_en: The note stuck on the office of academic affairs, while being somewhat excessive, was indeed due to his suspicious absence.
translation_zh: 他的学院事务所上贴的通知，尽管有些过分，但是确实因为他的可疑缺席而发出。（形迹可疑）

sentence: 他们俩是一对形影不离的好朋友
translation_en: They are an inseparable pair of good friends.
translation_zh: 他们是一个不能分离的好友之pair，形影不离。

sentence: 对于同学的缺点和错误，我们不应采取幸灾乐祸的态度
translation_en: We should not adopt an attitude of schadenfreude towards the shortcomings and mistakes of our students.
translation_zh: 我们应当避免对学生的缺陷和错误感到幸灾乐祸。(We should not feel joyful about the misfortunes or disasters of our students.)

sentence: 雄心壮志是促使一个人永远奋斗的发动机
translation_en: Ambition fuels one's determination to struggle forever.
translation_zh: "永远奋斗的决心，就是雄心壮志所驱动的" (Yǒngyuán fèn dòu de juéxīn, jiù shì xióngxīn zhuàngzhì suǒ kǎidǎng de)

sentence: 我们是休戚与共的好同学
translation_en: We are good friends of Xu Qiuju.
translation_zh: 我们和徐秋菊是好朋友，就像“休戚与共”一样。(We are good friends with Xu Qiuju, just like "resting and feasting together.")

sentence: 这位主管工作踏实，对于属下所反映的意见，都能虚己以听
translation_en: This manager handles work diligently, listening attentively to the opinions expressed by subordinates.
translation_zh: 这个经理勤奋地处理工作，并认真地收听下属的意见。（他）虚己以听。

sentence: 人要到月亮上去，以前认为是虚无飘渺的想法，而现在则是确实可行的事实
translation_en: People used to think it was an idea of emptiness and vagueness, but now it's a real possibility
translation_zh: 人们以前认为它是一个空虚和模糊的想法，但现在已经成为了实际可能。这个时代，空虚飘渺（虚无飘渺）不再是一种幻想，而是现实中的可能性。

sentence: 表面看上去他挺精明的，可实际上却是虚有其表，什么事也办不好
translation_en: He appears quite intelligent on the surface, but in reality, he is all show with no substance, unable to handle anything effectively.
translation_zh: 他在表面上看起来很聪明，但实际上是一副幌子，无法有效地处理任何事情。（虚有其表）

sentence: 没想到这么点小事竟然引起这样一场轩然大波
translation_en: This trivial matter unexpectedly caused such a great commotion
translation_zh: "这个轻微的事情不小心就引起了如轩然大波一般的骚动"

sentence: 但他们往往遭农会严厉拒绝，所以他们总是悬心吊胆地过日子
translation_en: They are usually harshly rejected by the farmers' association, so they live with constant anxiety.
translation_zh: 他们通常被农民协会厉害驳回，所以他们一直生活在悬心吊胆之中。(They are usually harshly rejected by the farmers' association, so they live with constant anxiety.)

sentence: 每次出门，妈妈都在家悬悬而望，等我归来
translation_en: Every time I go out, my mother waits at home with anticipation, hoping I return.
translation_zh: 每次我出门，母亲在家里悬悬而望，希望我回来。(Every time I go out, my mother waits at home with anticipation, hoping I return.)

sentence: 写作文不能照搬例文，那样会像学步邯郸一样，是写不出好文章来的
translation_en: Imitating model essays is not acceptable for writing compositions; it will result in work similar to learning kung fu in Shudong, making it difficult to write good articles.
translation_zh: 模板作文模仿是写作作品不可接受的，这样做就像在学习沈阳功夫，难以写出好的文章。学步邯郸意味着模仿别人的方法，但是永远无法取代自己的创造力。因此，我们应该努力找到自己的风格和思路，才能写出独特而优秀的文章。

sentence: 学习科学文化知识要符合实际，学以致用
translation_en: Study scientific knowledge should correspond to reality, learn for practical application
translation_zh: 学以致用，学习科学知识应与现实相符，学习的目的是实践。(Study with the aim of practical application, learning scientific knowledge should correspond to reality)

sentence: 他转回身来，面向着哀悼的人群，我们要把悲痛变成力量，我们要誓死报这场血海深仇
translation_en: He turned around and faced the mourning crowd, we shall turn grief into power, we shall avenge this sea of blood with our lives
translation_zh: 他转身面向哀悼的群众，我们将哀伤变为力量，我们将这个血海深仇以我们的生命报复。

sentence: 这一幅幅血泪斑斑的照片，正控诉着侵略者的杀人暴行
translation_en: This series of photos, stained with blood and tear-streaked, is testifying to the murderous atrocities of the invaders.
translation_zh: 这系列照片，沾满了血泪斑斑，正在证明入侵者的凶暴罪行。(This series of photos, stained with blood and tear-streaked, is testifying to the murderous atrocities of the invaders.)

sentence: 实践、认识、再实践、再认识，这种形式，循环往复以至无穷，而实践和认识之每一循环的内容，都比较地进到了高一级的程度
translation_en: Practice, recognition, practice again, recognition again, this form circulates repeatedly to infinity. The content of each cycle of practice and recognition has reached a higher level.
translation_zh: 每次练习和认识都有所提高，这种循环往复似乎无法结束。

sentence: 她通常是从一个角度写，而不是从几个角度写；还只是循序渐进地写，而不是错综交叉地写
translation_en: She usually writes from one angle, not multiple angles; moreover, she writes sequentially, not chaotically.
translation_zh: 她通常从一个角度写作，不是多个角度；此外，她的写作是顺序逐渐进行的，而不是混乱的。(循序渐进)

sentence: 这种徇私舞弊的事情，他绝不会干
translation_en: He will never participate in such corrupt activities.
translation_zh: 他绝不参与这种腐败活动，只会像徇私舞弊一样保持清白。

sentence: 现在我们言归正传，集中讨论这件事，发言要围绕中心
translation_en: Let's get back to basics, focus on discussing this matter, with speeches revolving around the center.
translation_zh: 让我们回到基础，专注讨论这个问题，话语围绕中心旋转。（言归正传）

sentence: 言为心声，从一个人平时的言谈之中，就可以了解他的思想状况
translation_en: One can understand a person's state of mind from his everyday speech.
translation_zh: 从他每日的话语中，可以了解到他的心情。（言为心声）

sentence: 虽然仁人们未必肯用，但我还可以言之成理
translation_en: Although benevolent people may not necessarily agree, I can still make my point logical
translation_zh: 尽管善人可能不同意，我仍然能够逻辑地表达自己的观点。(Translation: Although benevolent people may not necessarily agree, I can still make my point logical)

sentence: 这篇文章言之有序
translation_en: This article is well-organized.
translation_zh: 这篇文章已经很好地组织了，而且符合“言之有序”的要求。(This article is already very well-organized and meets the requirement of "言之有序.")

sentence: 听起来，那人坐在或站在正对面，俨乎其然地审问他
translation_en: That person seems to be questioning him, facing him directly and quite naturally.
translation_zh: 那个人似乎在直面他，并且很自然地面对着他。俨乎其然。

sentence: 村里明白人清楚，那武装部长是位‘雁过拨毛’的主儿，谁想从他底下当兵，不给他送点礼，那是门也没有
translation_en: Whoever wants to serve under that armed department leader, they must offer him some gifts; otherwise, there's no way in.
translation_zh: 想当那个武装部门领导的人，必须给他些礼物，否则进不去。（雁过拨毛）

sentence: 我们对待一切工作，都要从实际出发，扬长避短，讲求实效
translation_en: We should approach all work from practical standpoints, emphasizing strengths while acknowledging weaknesses, and aiming for tangible results.
translation_zh: 我们应该从实际角度出发，强调优势而同时承认弱点，目标是实现具体成果。(扬长避短)

sentence: 养儿防老的观念应该改变了
translation_en: The notion of raising children to support oneself in old age should change.
translation_zh: 我们应该改变养儿防老的思想。(We should change the notion of raising children to support oneself in old age.)

sentence: 这个人很不可靠，你却给与高位，怕会养虎为患哩
translation_en: This person is unreliable, yet you still trust them with high responsibilities; it might lead to problems down the line.
translation_zh: 这个人不可靠，还把高级职责托付给他，可能会导致后果危险。（养虎为患）

sentence: 他们个个像跑道上的选手，养精蓄锐，伸足擦腿，准备显身手
translation_en: They resemble athletes on a track, honing their skills, stretching their legs, preparing to showcase their abilities.
translation_zh: 他们就像在运动场上的运动员，努力提高技能、伸展腿部、准备展示能力，而且正在积极养精蓄锐。

sentence: 球场上球迷们摇旗呐喊，为各自的球队助威
translation_en: Fans on the field wave flags and cheer, supporting their respective teams
translation_zh: 球场上的粉丝摆开旗帜，热情地呐喊支持各自的队伍。(Fans on the field wave flags and cheer, supporting their respective teams)

sentence: 看着河水受污染的面积日益扩大，大家不禁摇头叹息
translation_en: The polluted area of the river is increasingly expanding, and everyone cannot help but shake their heads in dismay.
translation_zh: 河边污水区域不断扩大， everybody 都无法帮但是摇头叹息。(The polluted area of the river is increasingly expanding, and everyone cannot help but shake their heads in dismay.)

sentence: 这件事我不能遥遥无期地等下去，希望能尽快给以解决
translation_en: I cannot continue to wait indefinitely for this matter; I hope it can be resolved as soon as possible.
translation_zh: 我不能再长期地等待这个问题，希望它可以尽快解决，遥遥无期的等待已经足够了。(The idiom "遥遥无期" is integrated into the sentence.)

sentence: 学习文件不能只咬文嚼字，关键是领会文件的精神实质
translation_en: Understanding the essence of a document is more important than merely reading its words.
translation_zh: 咬文嚼字地读文件更重要，因为理解文件的本质比单纯阅读文字更重要。(Understanding the essence of a document is more important than merely reading its words; it's like biting off more than one can chew when it comes to reading a document.)

sentence: 我的创作态度多么严肃，我真是一笔不苟
translation_en: My creative attitude is extremely serious, I am truly unyielding.
translation_zh: 我的创造态度非常严谨，实在不屈。(My creative attitude is extremely serious, I am truly unyielding.)

sentence: 本县为官，上不欺君，下不虐民，自到任二年之久，我一秉大公办事
translation_en: He served as an official in this county, never oppressing his superiors above nor mistreating the people below. After two years in office, he remained committed to upholding public integrity.
translation_zh: 他在这个县当官，从未欺压上级也没有虐待下级。两年来，他一直坚持维护公正。（一秉大公）

sentence: 知识要通过学习逐渐积累，想一步登天是不可能的
translation_en: Knowledge should be gradually accumulated through learning, it's impossible to leap to success overnight.
translation_zh: 通过学习逐渐积累知识，一步登天成功是不可能的。(Translation: It is impossible to achieve success by leaping overnight through learning.)

sentence: 一个脾气大，一个不懂事，若是有了一差二误，没把我这老婆子骂死了哩
translation_en: A hot-tempered one, an irresponsible one, if they made even a minor mistake, they didn't curse me, their wife, to death.
translation_zh: 他们，一个热血的，一个不负责任的，即使做了一点小错，也没有死我，他们妻子。这个情况下，他们就是“一差二误”了。

sentence: 如果遇上一长二短，你也不要害怕，要沉住气应付他们
translation_en: If you encounter one long and two short, don't be afraid. Calm down and handle them.
translation_zh: 遇到一长两短，不要怕，镇定下来处理它们。(One long and two short, don't be afraid, calm down and handle them.)

sentence: 此项提议对各方面都有利，所以能一唱百和，立刻获得许多人的支持
translation_en: This proposal benefits all aspects, so it can bring harmony, immediately gaining many people's support.
translation_zh: 这个建议能够为所有方面带来好处，因此立即就可以赢得许多人的支持，就像一唱百和一样。

sentence: 事物都是在发展的，世界上没有一成不变的东西
translation_en: Everything is always developing; there's nothing unchanging in the world.
translation_zh: 世界上没有什么永不变化的，一成不变地一切都在发展中。(One succession without change, everything is constantly developing.)

sentence: 我们必须向着改善现实的动向努力，但是我们同时也须明了这并不是一蹴可几
translation_en: We must strive towards improving reality, but we should also clearly understand that this is not a quick fix.
translation_zh: 我们必须努力改善现实，但是我们也应该清楚地理解，这不是一个快速修复。(一蹴可几)

sentence: 沉寂的寒夜，静悄悄已没一点半点风意
translation_en: The tranquil cold night, not a whisper of wind remains.
translation_zh: 一点半点的寂静冷夜，风声已无踪。(The tranquil cold night, with barely a whisper of wind remaining.)

sentence: 我们要从一点一滴的小事做起
translation_en: Let's start from small things one by one.
translation_zh: 从小事开始，一点一滴地进行。(From small events, proceed little by little.)

sentence: 我们不能拿群众的一分一毫
translation_en: We cannot take even a penny from the masses.
translation_zh: 我们绝不能从民众中夺取一分一毫的钱。(We cannot take even a penny from the masses.)

sentence: 我们对具体问题要做具体分析，决不能一概而论
translation_en: We should analyze specific issues concretely, not make generalizations.
translation_zh: 我们应当具体分析特定问题，不要盲目总结。(一概而论)

sentence: 从前学过的一点天文学知识，长期不用，早忘得一干二净
translation_en: Forgotten over time, the bits of astronomy I learned long ago.
translation_zh: 过了时间，我以前学的天文知识已经逐渐被遗忘，就像一干二净一样。(Literally: "Over time, the knowledge of astronomy that I learned long ago has gradually been forgotten, just like one sweep cleans everything.")

sentence: 她的一举一动都像个多年的媳妇，麻利，老到，还带着点自得的劲儿
translation_en: She moves with the grace of an experienced wife, efficient, mature, and possessing a certain self-assuredness.
translation_zh: 她以经验丰富的妻子的流畅如水的风格行事，效率高、成熟、自信。(She acts with the fluidity of an experienced wife, efficiently, maturely, and confidently.)

sentence: 他连鼻烟也不嗅了，看一看钟，六点还差十多分，他不能延误一刻千金的光阴
translation_en: He no longer smells even cigarette smoke, glancing at the clock shows it's six minutes to the hour, he cannot delay a single moment of his precious time.
translation_zh: 他已不再闻到烟雾，看钟就是六分钟，他无法滞留任何一刻他的宝贵时间。（一刻千金）

sentence: 以上所说是我个人的一孔之见，仅供大家参考
translation_en: The opinions stated above are my personal views, intended for reference only.
translation_zh: 我上面所表达的观点，是我个人的看法，仅供参考。这就像一孔之见，只能看到一个方向。

sentence: 这时又围上许多战士，一口同音说‘谁说不是？我们永远忘不了你。’
translation_en: At this moment, many soldiers gathered around, all speaking in unison, saying, "Who said it wasn't so? We will never forget you."
translation_zh: 当前时刻，许多士兵聚集在一起，他们都在吼喊：“谁说不是？我们永远不会忘记你。”这就像一口同音一样。(Translation: At this moment, many soldiers gathered around, all speaking in unison, saying, "Who said it wasn't so? We will never forget you." This is like having one voice.)

sentence: 我们这次出门旅行真是一路顺风，沿途一点儿也没有耽误
translation_en: Our journey this time traveling outside was truly smooth sailing, encountering no delays along the way.
translation_zh: 我们这次时空旅行，真的很平稳，没有遇到任何延误。(Our journey this time traveling outside was truly smooth sailing, encountering no delays along the way. One could say it was like 一路顺风.)

sentence: 在这件事情上，我们不能只听一面之词，必须全面了解情况，然后再做处理
translation_en: We cannot base our actions solely on one side's words; we need to fully understand the situation before taking action.
translation_zh: 我们不能仅靠一方的话语作为行动的基础，需要充分了解情况再做出行动。(一面之词)

sentence: 咱们总算有一面之交，在兵营里你伺候过我；再说咱们又都是街面上的人，所以我担着好大的处分来给你送个信
translation_en: We finally have something in common, you nursed me in the barracks; moreover, we are both people of the streets, so I brought you a letter with great apprehension for the punishment it might bring
translation_zh: 我们终于有了共同点，你在军营里照顾过我；再者，我们都是街头人，因此我带来了一封带有恐惧的信，担心它可能带来的惩罚。(这封信中的内容) 我们的关系已经到了一面之交了。

sentence: 这两件衣服从颜色到款式虽然一模一样，但质量却有很大差别
translation_en: These two pieces of clothing may look identical in color and style, but there is a significant difference in quality.
translation_zh: 尽管这两件衣服在颜色和风格上看起来完全相同，但质量上存在明显的差异。（一模一样）

sentence: 他们跑出英文教室，说的听的依然是中国话。这只是‘一曝十寒’的办法罢了，对于理解的功夫完全抛荒
translation_en: They ran out of the English classroom, yet still spoke Chinese. This is just a method called 'one cold night', completely abandoning the effort to understand.
translation_zh: 尽管他们从英语教室跑出来，仍然说中文。这就是一种称为“一曝十寒”的方法，完全放弃了努力理解的努力。

sentence: 在他们的意念中，一切都是为了迅速改变‘一穷二白’的面貌
translation_en: In their minds, everything is aimed at quickly changing the appearance of 'poor and destitute'
translation_zh: 他们的心中，一切都是为了快速改变“一穷二白”的外貌。(In their minds, everything is aimed at quickly changing the appearance of 'poor and destitute')

sentence: 可是，中国又穷又弱的现状一如既往，丝毫无所改变
translation_en: Despite this, China's situation of being poor and weak remains unchanged, showing no signs of improvement whatsoever.
translation_zh: 尽管这样，中国的困难日新月异仍未改变，显示出无法见缝挡的任何进步。(一如既往)

sentence: 我们在学习上，应有一丝不苟的精神
translation_en: We should have a spirit of perseverance in our learning.
translation_zh: 我们在学习中应该持有一丝不苟的精神。(We should have a spirit of perseverance in our learning.)

sentence: 对于精密零件的加工，不允许有一丝一毫的误差
translation_en: There should be no trace of error in the processing of precision parts.
translation_zh: 在精密零部件的处理过程中，绝不能有任何错误的踪影。(一丝一毫)

sentence: 窗外一团漆黑，什么也看不清
translation_en: Outside, it's one big black mass, nothing is visible.
translation_zh: 外面一团漆黑，无法看清任何东西。(Outside, it's one big black mass, nothing is visible.)

sentence: 如果他有钱给那些人行点贿送包'烟钱'，也就过去了；可是他身上一文不名
translation_en: If he had money to bribe those people with some 'cigarette money', it would have passed; however, he has no money at all.
translation_zh: 如果他有能够用“烟钱”贿赂那些人，就会通过；但是，他根本没有一分钱。(一文不名)

sentence: 他虽然有许多缺点，但并不是一无可取，他也有许多长处值得大家学习
translation_en: Despite his many shortcomings, he is not without merit; he also has many admirable qualities worth learning from.
translation_zh: 尽管他有许多不足之处，但他并非没有价值；他也拥有许多值得学习的优点。（他）一无可取。

sentence: 但此处却一无所闻，我看这事情大约已经过去了
translation_en: But here, I've heard nothing about it. I think this matter has already passed.
translation_zh: 我在这里没有听到任何消息，似乎这件事已经过去了。(Here, I've heard nothing about it; seemingly, this matter has already passed.)

sentence: 他把事情发生的经过一五一十地向大家讲了一遍
translation_en: He went over the details of what happened fifteen times to everyone
translation_zh: 他fifteen次都详细地向每个人讲述了发生的事情，就像是一五一十一样。(He went over the details of what happened fifteen times to everyone, just like one five ten.)

sentence: 那占着玻璃柜一席之地的彩塑泥人，却比什么都吸引我
translation_en: The clay sculpture figure standing at the glass cabinet captivated me more than anything else.
translation_zh: 一席之地上，柏木雕像引得我比任何其他东西更加注目。

sentence: 说起这件事，真是一言难尽，等有时间我们再详谈
translation_en: It's hard to put into words about this matter, but when I have time, let's discuss it in detail.
translation_zh: 这个问题说不清楚，但我有时间的话，让我们详细讨论。（一言难尽）

sentence: 厨房里的各种调味作料，一应俱全
translation_en: All kinds of seasonings and condiments in the kitchen are complete
translation_zh: 厨房中的各种调味料和配料都已完备。(Yī yìng jù quán)

sentence: 我们的祖宗是很富强的，为什么现在贫弱一至于此呢
translation_en: Why have our ancestors been strong and prosperous, yet we find ourselves weak and poor now?
translation_zh: 为什么我们的祖先能够强大富足，而现在却弱小贫困？这就像一至于此一样。(One step at a time they reached here; implying that a series of events led to the current state)

sentence: 他仅用几句话，就把那种奢侈豪华，一掷千金的情景描绘出来了
translation_en: He depicted that extravagant, opulent scene with just a few words.
translation_zh: 他就用几个字描绘了那一张奢华豪华的画面，如同一掷千金。

sentence: 你看吧，衣衫褴褛的饥民们冻得缩着肩膀，守候在庄稼院的街门口
translation_en: The ragged, starving people huddle with shoulders, waiting at the gate of the grain storehouse.
translation_zh: 饥渴盼望，人群聚在谷仓门前，身上衣衫褴褛。

sentence: 究竟是赞成还是反对，应当态度鲜明，不要依违两可
translation_en: It is important to have a clear stance, whether for or against, rather than being indecisive.
translation_zh: 无论是支持还是反对，都要清楚立场，而不是陷入懈怠。(依违两可)

sentence: 晚会结束已经大半天了，同学们才依依不舍地离去
translation_en: The party has been over for more than half a day, and students reluctantly leave one by one.
translation_zh: 已经过了半天的时间，学生逐渐地离开，每个人都依依不舍。(Already passed more than half a day, students gradually leave, each person reluctant to part.)

sentence: 湖上的明月和落日，湖上的浓阴和微雨，我都见过了，真是仪态万千
translation_en: The moon and sunset on the lake, as well as the thick clouds and light rain, I have witnessed all of them, truly a spectacle of grandeur.
translation_zh: "在湖上看到月亮和夕阳，同时也见到了厚云和轻雨，我都见过了，真是一场宏伟的秀丽。"

sentence: 我们要移风易俗，形成讲科学的好风气
translation_en: We need to modernize and make things more fashionable, creating a good atmosphere for discussing science.
translation_zh: 我们需要现代化，使事物更时尚，创造一个好的科学讨论氛围，同时也要“移风易俗”。(Translation: We need to modernize, making things more fashionable, creating a good atmosphere for discussing science, and also "moving with the times.")

sentence: 在困难面前我们要有移山倒海的气魄，才不会被困难吓倒
translation_en: We should have the spirit to move mountains and overturn seas, lest we be intimidated by difficulties.
translation_zh: 必须拥有动力移山倒海，否则难题将会使我们沮丧。(Yǒu xū yǒng zhì yí shān dào hǎi, bì xū suǒ wèi nán tí zhī wǒ men mèi zài.)

sentence: 卖国投敌的小丑们，没有一个不是遗臭万年的
translation_en: Traitors who sell their country to the enemy will forever carry an infamous reputation.
translation_zh: 叛国贼们永远会留下不可抹去的骇人狰狞之名。(Traitors who sell their country to the enemy will forever carry an infamous reputation.)

sentence: 以毒攻毒，反而证明了反对白话者自己的不识字，不通文
translation_en: Poisoning with poison, it instead proved the illiteracy of those opposing Mandarin.
translation_zh: 使用毒药，反而证明了反对普通话的不文化。(Using poison, it instead proved the illiteracy of those opposing Mandarin.)

sentence: 我们要提高警惕，以防万一敌人来偷袭
translation_en: We need to heighten our alertness, in case the enemy attempts a surprise attack.
translation_zh: 以防万一，我们需要提高警惕，防止敌人 sudden 攻击。(In case the enemy attempts a surprise attack, we need to heighten our alertness.)

sentence: 在这次足球比赛中，主队采取了以攻为守的战术
translation_en: In this soccer match, the home team employed an offensive tactic.
translation_zh: 这场足球比赛，家队采用了一种进攻性的策略，即以攻为守。

sentence: 我以为各人均应先打屁股百下，以儆效尤
translation_en: Everyone should bow fifty times before sitting, as a warning to others
translation_zh: 每个人应该五十次跪下，作为警示他人，这样就像"以儆效尤"一样。

sentence: 压服的结果总是压而不服。以力服人是不行的
translation_en: Force always subdues but is never obeyed. Using power to dominate others is not effective.
translation_zh: 强制总能压制，但永远不被遵从。使用力量�yrannize 他人并不有效果。

sentence: 真是糟糕，他早又不说，但也只怪我们以貌取人，在事前没有经过一道甄别了
translation_en: Terrible indeed, he didn't speak early on, but we can only blame ourselves for judging by appearance. There was no preliminary screening process.
translation_zh: 他真是不言而尤，初起就没有说话，但我们只能自责，因为根据外表判断。没有先进行形式的筛选。（以貌取人）

sentence: 要坚决打击以权谋私的犯罪分子
translation_en: Determinedly combat corrupt officials who seek personal gain
translation_zh: 必须坚决打击滥用职权为私利的官员

sentence: 我军决定暂时以守为攻，消耗敌人兵力，然后再集中力量突过河去，全歼敌人
translation_en: Our army has decided to temporarily defend as an offensive, deplete enemy troops, and then concentrate our strength to cross the river and annihilate the enemy.
translation_zh: 我们军临时以守为攻，消耗敌军，然后集中力量过河灭绝敌 army temporarily uses defense as offense, depletes enemy troops, and then concentrates strength to cross the river and annihilate the enemy, using defense as offense to deplete enemy troops and then crossing the river with concentrated strength to annihilate the enemy.

sentence: 以小见大，我们可以看出他的为人
translation_en: We can see his character from small things.
translation_zh: 他的性格从小事上看，我们就能明显地看出来。(His character can be clearly seen from small things.)

sentence: 你自己想一想，你们做的事合理不合理？是不是以怨报德
translation_en: Is what you've done reasonable or not? Could it be that you're retaliating out of spite?
translation_zh: 你的行为是否合理？有可能是因为恨而报复吗？(以怨报德)

sentence: 我们应该义不容辞地担当起这个任务
translation_en: We should take up this task resolutely.
translation_zh: 我们应该坚决地接受这项任务。(义不容辞)

sentence: 他俩现在越发脱离群众，每天下午跑到宝塔下谈天，群众议论纷纷
translation_en: They are increasingly distancing themselves from the crowd, often discussing heaven in the afternoon at Bota, with the crowd having various discussions about it.
translation_zh: 他们越来越远离群众，常在下午在波塔谈天，而群众则各有所说。(议论纷纷)

sentence: 环境保护已经提到各级领导的议事日程上来了
translation_en: Environmental protection has been included in the agenda of various leadership meetings.
translation_zh: 环境保护已经被各种领导会议的议事日程中包含在内。(Environmental protection has been included in the agendas of various leadership meetings.)

sentence: 有的谈当前纷乱的政治形势，猜测战争的发展趋势；有的谈政界的逸闻趣事
translation_en: Some discuss the chaotic political situation, speculating on the trends of war development; some talk about interesting anecdotes from the political circle.
translation_zh: 逸闻趣事中，有人讨论混乱的政治情况，猜测战争发展的趋势；有人谈论政治圈里的有趣小故事。(In the midst of interesting anecdotes, some discuss the chaotic political situation, speculating on the trends of war development; some talk about interesting anecdotes from the political circle.)

sentence: 又有时谈一些与评价无关的逸闻琐事，给文字增加无穷余韵，真是高妙极了
translation_en: These occasional anecdotes unrelated to evaluation add infinite elegance to the text, truly remarkable.
translation_zh: 这些偶尔出现的与评估无关的小事虽然无法改变结果，但却使文本具有无限的雅致，简直是奇妙之举。

sentence: 伟大的中国人民正在意气风发地建设自己的祖国
translation_en: The great Chinese people are actively constructing their own homeland with high spirits.
translation_zh: 大汉民族积极地在高兴的情况下自己建设祖国，意气风发。(The great Chinese people are actively constructing their own homeland with high spirits, full of vigor.)

sentence: 农民们互相传说，彼此相告，雀跃的欣喜的心情溢于言表
translation_en: Farmers shared stories among themselves, exchanging news, their joyful hearts overflowing with excitement.
translation_zh: 农民们之间分享了故事，互相传递新闻，他们的快乐心情溢于言表。(Farmers shared stories among themselves, exchanging news, their joyful hearts overflowed with more than they could express.)

sentence: 他毅然决然地抛弃了国外优裕的生活，回到了祖国
translation_en: He resolutely gave up his affluent overseas life and returned to his homeland.
translation_zh: 他坚定不移地放下了海外豪华生活，回到了自己的祖国。(He resolutely gave up his affluent overseas life and returned to his homeland with determination.)

sentence: 教师应当注意学生各方面的差异，以便因材施教
translation_en: Teachers should pay attention to the various differences among students, so as to teach according to their abilities
translation_zh: 为了根据学生的能力进行教学，教师应当注意各个学生之间的差异。(因材施教)

sentence: 所以开明的行政者对于民意是因势利导的，民意得到畅达，社会也就健全地发展了起来
translation_en: Enlightened administrators shape their actions according to public opinion, which is manipulated for advantage; when public opinion is free to flourish, so does the society develop healthily.
translation_zh: 明智的领导根据公众意见调整行动，这是为了取得优势；当公众意见自由发扬时，社会才能健康发展。因此，我们应该坚持让公众意见自由流通，以便使社会更加健康发展。（因势利导）

sentence: 这篇精妙的论文，因为名额有限，未能入选，颇令人引以为憾
translation_en: This brilliant essay was unfortunately not selected due to limited quotas, which is quite regrettable.
translation_zh: 这篇卓越的论文遗憾之下未能被选中，是非常可惜的，引以为憾。

sentence: 中国是一个伟大的国家，有永远值得引以为荣的历史和文化，但是现在确实需要发展
translation_en: China is a great country, with a history and culture worthy of admiration that lasts forever, but it indeed needs development now.
translation_zh: 中国是一国值得尊敬的大国，历史文化骄傲无比，永不消逝，但实际上需要现在的发展。引以为荣，即表示用优点来提高自己的地位或价值，因此这句话可以理解为：中国的优点使它被人们尊敬，但它也需要发展以提高其地位和价值。

sentence: 这家商场里的商品品种丰富，应有尽有
translation_en: The variety of goods in this mall is abundant, catering to all needs.
translation_zh: 这个商场的货品种类富裕，适合满足所有需求。(应有尽有)

sentence: 领导说什么，他就说什么，简直是鹦鹉学舌
translation_en: Parrots merely repeat what they hear, just like he does whatever the leader says.
translation_zh: 他就像一只鹦鹉，凭借听到的话语而无创造力。(鹦鹉学舌)

sentence: 其中最活跃的是有几位没有制服的外国巡捕，两手都握着手枪，鹰瞵鹗视地东奔西突
translation_en: Among them, several foreign patrol officers without uniforms were particularly active. They both held handguns, scanning east and west in a dash.
translation_zh: 在他们中间，几名外国巡逻官没有制服，特别活跃。他们俩手持枪，东西扫描地道一跑。这些人就像鹰瞵鹗视一样，警惕性很强。(Their vigilance is like that of a hawk watching a crane.)

sentence: 红旗一面迎风招展，附近至少一公里的半径内都可以望见
translation_en: The red flag, unfurled against the wind, can be seen for at least a mile in all directions.
translation_zh: 迎风招展的红旗，可以在四周至少一英里内清晰地看见。(The red flag, unfurled against the wind, can be seen for at least a mile in all directions.)

sentence: 孩子们所盼望的，过年过节之外，大概要数迎神赛会的时候了
translation_en: The children have been eagerly awaiting it, and it seems that around the time of the Lantern Festival, we should expect the New Year celebrations.
translation_zh: 孩子们已经盼望它了，似乎在灯estival时，我们应该期待新年庆祝。新年庆祝的到来似乎就像是迎接神的比赛会一样。(Translation: The children have been eagerly awaiting it, and it seems that around the time of the Lantern Festival, we should expect the New Year celebrations. The arrival of the New Year celebrations seems just like participating in the race to welcome the gods.)

sentence: 我国科学技术必须迎头赶上世界先进水平
translation_en: Science and technology in our country must catch up with the advanced global level.
translation_zh: 我们国家的科技必须与先进世界水平迎头赶上。

sentence: 它们算盘虽精，却忘了灵活应用，不知道得来一点蝇头小利，而付出了难以估计的代价
translation_en: They may have fine calculators, but they forgot to apply them flexibly, unaware of gaining some small advantage, yet paid an indeterminate cost.
translation_zh: 尽管他们拥有精良的计算器，却忘记灵活运用，不知道在某些地方获得微小的优势，但却付出了无法确定的代价。这时候就像蝇头小利一样，似乎有利可图，实则是徒然损失。

sentence: 追求真理永无止境
translation_en: Pursuit of truth is boundless
translation_zh: 追求真理是永无止境的。(Zhuīqiú zhēnlǐ shì yǒngwú zhìjíng de.)

sentence: 在人类社会中，优胜劣败的现象经常发生
translation_en: The phenomenon of survival of the fittest often occurs in human society
translation_zh: 人类社会中，强者常常生存，即“优胜劣败”的现象频繁出现。(In human society, the strong often survive, which is the frequent occurrence of "the superior overcomes the inferior.")

sentence: 看问题要由表及里
translation_en: Understand the problem by looking at both its surface and depth
translation_zh: 通过看表面和深层来理解问题，即"由表及里"。

sentence: 这首诗体现了老诗人由博返约的创作轨迹
translation_en: This poem reflects the creative trajectory of the ancient poet from Du Fu to Yan Yu.
translation_zh: 这首诗反映了古代从杜甫到阎禹的创作轨迹，就像“由博返约”一样展现了不断发展和回归的趋势。

sentence: 在决定这件事如何处理时，他变得犹豫不决起来
translation_en: He became indecisive when deciding how to handle this matter.
translation_zh: 他在这个问题上变得犹豫不决。(He became indecisive when deciding this matter.)

sentence: 当时我心里急得油煎火燎，只怕他说个不成
translation_en: I was so nervous at the time that my heart raced like frying oil on fire, afraid he might say something unreasonable.
translation_zh: 我在那时非常忐忑，心跳得像炒油子一样快，怕他说些不合理的话。(油煎火燎)

sentence: 这个人油嘴滑舌的，很使人烦
translation_en: This person is oily and slippery, very annoying
translation_zh: 这个人很油嘴滑舌，非常烦人。(This person is oily and slippery, very annoying)

sentence: 从前他们又要办厂，又要做公债，也居然稳渡了两次险恶的风波，现在他们全力来做公债，自然觉得游刃有余
translation_en: They had previously planned to establish factories, issue bonds, and surprisingly navigated through two dangerous turbulences. Now, they are exerting all their efforts on issuing bonds, feeling that they have some room for maneuver left.
translation_zh: 他们先前已经计划在各地建立工厂，发行债券，竟然驾过两个危险的涡轮。现在，他们正在全力以赴发行债券，感觉自己还有些余地。这时候，游刃有余。

sentence: 只要是有例可援的事情，都可以答应
translation_en: I can agree to anything that has a precedent.
translation_zh: 有例可援，我就同意任何有前例的事情。(I can agree to anything that has a precedent.)

sentence: 近年来，我国在经济领域所取得的成就是有目共睹的
translation_en: In recent years, China's achievements in the economic field have been widely visible.
translation_zh: 近年来，中国经济领域的成就已广为人知，是有目共睹的。(The achievements in the economic field of China in recent years have become widely visible, which is something that can be seen by all.)

sentence: 她往年说话，有声无气；现在她一开口，隔巷也能听到她的声音
translation_en: Her voice used to be hoarse; now, her voice carries even across the alley when she speaks.
translation_zh: 她之前的声音常常嗓子粗，现在就能在小巷里传出来，说话时很清晰。（有声无气）

sentence: 同学之间要有始有终地保持友好关系
translation_en: Maintain friendly relationships among peers with a beginning and an end.
translation_zh: 与同事保持有始有终的关系。(Yǔ tóngshì bǎohuì yǒushǐyǒuzhōng de guanxi)

sentence: 我们实在还有一个更正大的理由使自己有恃无恐
translation_en: We still have a more compelling reason to act with impunity.
translation_zh: 我们还有更强大的理由冒险无忌。(We still have a more compelling reason to act with impunity.)

sentence: 老师对学生提出的问题应该有问必答
translation_en: Teachers should answer questions that students pose.
translation_zh: 学生提出的问题，教师一定要回答。(有问必答)

sentence: 到黄金时代的路上，究竟是悲哀，是痛苦，是兴奋，是痛快？这都是又当别论，不在乱弹之列
translation_en: On the road to the golden age, is it sorrow, pain, excitement, or joy? These are all questions that are beyond debate, not among the list of random speculations.
translation_zh: 在黄金时代的路上，是哀伤、痛苦、兴奋还是喜悦？这些都是无法争议的问题，不属于随机猜测的列表之中。

sentence: 大错已经铸成，你再责备他也于事无补
translation_en: The mistake has already been cast; scolding him more will do no good.
translation_zh: 已经犯错了，再骂他也无济于事。(Already made a mistake, scolding him more won't help.)

sentence: 我看见这种认真的忙迫的情形时，心里总想开口向它们发一句愚不可及的提问——往哪里去
translation_en: Where are you heading to?
translation_zh: 你到哪里要去了？愚不可及，我希望能跟上你。(Literally: "Where are you going? Idiotically unreachable, I hope to catch up with you.")

sentence: 在现代化建设中，我们要发扬愚公移山的精神
translation_en: We should embody the spirit of Yu the Great, moving mountains in modernization efforts.
translation_zh: 我们应当像大 Yu 一样，在现代化努力中展示出愚公移山的精神。(We should embody the spirit of Yu the Great, showing the spirit of "moving mountains" in our modernization efforts.)

sentence: 这名高级官员在演说中公然侮辱新闻记者，顿时舆论哗然
translation_en: This high-level official publicly insulted a news reporter during his speech, causing an uproar in public opinion.
translation_zh: 这位高级官员在演说中公开骂击新闻记者，引发了广泛的舆论哗然。(This high-level official publicly insulted a news reporter during his speech, causing a buzz in public opinion.)

sentence: 这个山区基本上是与世隔绝的
translation_en: This mountain region is largely isolated from the world.
translation_zh: "这个山区与世隔绝，几乎没有联系世界。" (This mountain region is isolated from the world, having little contact with it.)

sentence: 从他与众不同的解题思路中，看出他很聪明
translation_en: His unique approach to solving problems shows he is intelligent.
translation_zh: 他的独特解决问题方法显示出他很聪明，与众不同。(His unique approach to solving problems shows he is intelligent, standing out from the crowd.)

sentence: 远处是几个农村，丛树和屋舍密集重叠，大有郁郁葱葱的气象
translation_en: Distant are several villages, thickly clustered with trees and houses overlapping, giving off a dense, somber atmosphere
translation_zh: 郁郁葱葱的几个村庄，树木密集、房屋重叠，给人一种沉甸甸的气氛。(Literally: Several villages are densely packed like tightly intertwined mugwort, giving off a heavy, somber atmosphere.)

sentence: 与其欲盖弥彰，倒不如自己先认了
translation_en: It's better to admit one's mistakes than to try to cover them up.
translation_zh: 欲盖弥彰比较好，不如承认错误。(Admitting one's mistakes is better than trying to cover them up.)

sentence: 写文章经常采用欲扬先抑的手法
translation_en: Often employ a strategy of initially understating before emphasizing when writing articles
translation_zh: 在写文章时，通常先低调再强调，这就像欲扬先抑一样。

sentence: 还争什么强，要结下下一辈的冤家对头吗
translation_en: Are we still fighting over who's stronger, planning to create more avengers for the next generation?
translation_zh: 我们还在谈论谁更强，打算为下一代创造更多的大侠？(We are still discussing who is stronger, planning to create more heroes for the next generation?)

sentence: 我已经查明白源源本本是怎么一回事
translation_en: I have figured out exactly what it is, from the very beginning.
translation_zh: 从一开始就已经明白了，正是源源本本的理解。

sentence: 我们很郑重地和工头约法三章，什么时候交稿，什么时候看校，什么时候拼版
translation_en: We agreed with the foreman on Chapter Three of the contract regarding when to submit drafts, when to review, and when to typeset.
translation_zh: 我们与工头在合同的第三章上就了提交草稿、审核和排版的时间达成一致。（约法三章）

sentence: 河湾子修堰坝的工地，月明星稀，小河水静静流入水渠
translation_en: The construction site of the dam on the creek by the bay is quiet at night, with the moon shining sparsely and the small stream flowing gently into the canal.
translation_zh: 在湾边小溪附近的坝站晚上很静，月亮明亮而稀少，小流水漫步而入水道。月明星稀就像夜晚那颗闪烁的灯火，照亮了整个场景。

sentence: 孩子能做的事，父母不要越俎代庖
translation_en: Parents should not do everything for their children
translation_zh: 父母不应为子女做一切事情，而是让他们自己学会做事。（越俎代庖）

sentence: 战士们行进在云雾迷蒙的山间小路上
translation_en: Soldiers are advancing along a narrow path shrouded in misty mountains.
translation_zh: 军队在雾蒙蒙的山路上前进，就像云雾迷蒙一样。(Military is advancing on a misty mountain path, just like being lost in the fog.)

sentence: 这些数学公式他掌握的很好，所以做题能运用自如
translation_en: He understands these mathematical formulas quite well, so he can apply them easily when doing problems.
translation_zh: 他对这些数学公式理解得很好，所以在做问题时就可以轻松运用自如。

sentence: 欠你的账，即使砸锅卖铁我也要给你还上
translation_en: I owe you money, even if I sell iron by smashing pots, I will repay you.
translation_zh: 我虽然出了钱，但是砸锅卖铁还要还你的钱。(I may have spent money, but I still need to repay you even if I sell iron by smashing pots.)

sentence: 春节晚会上，穿着节日盛装的各族代表，在舞台上载歌载舞，欢庆节日
translation_en: On the Spring Festival Gala, representatives from various ethnic groups, dressed in festive attire, performed songs and dances on stage, celebrating the festival
translation_zh: 各族代表在春节晚会上，穿着华丽的服装，在舞台上唱歌跳舞，庆祝节日，就像载歌载舞一样。(Each representative at the Spring Festival Gala, wearing festive attire, sang and danced on stage, celebrating the festival, just like carrying on singing and dancing.)

sentence: 取得好成绩也不能自满，要再接再厉，不断进取
translation_en: Achieving good grades should not lead to self-satisfaction, but rather persist and strive harder, continuously making progress.
translation_zh: 好成绩不应该导致自满，而是持续努力，不断进取。再接再厉。(Continuous progress should follow good grades, not self-satisfaction; persist and strive harder. Again, be more rigorous.)

sentence: 曾经有位总长，听说，他的出来就职，是因为某公司要来立案，表决时可以多一个赞成者，所以再作冯妇的
translation_en: A former manager was hired because it was said that a company was coming to file a lawsuit, and an additional supporter could be gained during voting, so they made a fake vote.
translation_zh: 因为有人说公司要提起诉讼，需要一个额外的支持者在投票中，所以他们做了一次伪造的选票。（再作冯妇）

sentence: 只要你舍得这辆汽车，我就奉陪三百回合，直到大雨把汽车冲进大河，咱俩一同葬身鱼腹
translation_en: As long as you're willing to part with this car, I'll accompany you for three hundred laps, until heavy rain floods the car and sinks it into the river, where we'll both perish together.
translation_zh: 你如果愿意放下这辆车，我就随你陪伴三百圈，直到雨水淹没车子，将它推进河中，直到两个人都沉没在水里。

sentence: 他按照早出晚归捕鱼撒网那股悠闲的心情撑着船，编算着使自己高兴也使别人高兴的事情
translation_en: He leisurely fishes, casting his net according to an early rise and late return rhythm, calculating things that would make him and others happy.
translation_zh: 他逐漫地钓鱼，根据早出晚归的节奏投网，计算着能让自己和他人快乐的事情。(He leisurely fishes, casting his net according to an early rise and late return rhythm, calculating things that would make him and others happy. In this rhythm of early rise and late return, he is fishing.)

sentence: 这人品质恶劣，对别人惯会造谣中伤
translation_en: This person has poor quality, often slanders others maliciously.
translation_zh: 这个人的品质不好，常常恶意地捏造事实，导致他人受到伤害。(This person's quality is poor, often maliciously fabricating facts, causing harm to others.)

sentence: 农民向国家交售征购粮是责无旁贷的任务
translation_en: Farmers selling grain purchased for procurement to the state is a task without interest-bearing loans.
translation_zh: 农民出售购买国有粮的任务，就像没有利息贷款一样。(责无旁贷)

sentence: 曾几何时，他自己去做了一个小小的官儿回来，而他又劝我去学法政了
translation_en: A long time has passed since, he returned after doing a small official job himself, and he advised me to study law instead.
translation_zh: 他自己完成了一个小官职后已经过了许久，然后他建议我当法学生。之前这么久不见了。(Once upon a time, he completed a small official job himself and has been absent for a long while; now he advises me to study law.)

sentence: 老兄是曾经沧海，车皮底下也呆过三天三夜，这一点挤，而且不过两个钟头，不算什么，算不了什么
translation_en: He was once tossed by the sea, spent three days and three nights under the carriage, which is quite tough, and it's not much after all, doesn't count for much.
translation_zh: 他曾经被海涛摔了，三日三夜在车下，实在是艰难，但也不算多，没有多大价值。

sentence: 由于经营不善，这家公司现已陷入债台高筑的境地
translation_en: Due to poor business performance, this company is now in a situation of high debt pile-up.
translation_zh: 由于业绩不佳，这家公司现在处于高债化状态。(High debt pile-up = 高债化)

sentence: 我喜欢那种斩钉截铁的作风
translation_en: I enjoy that stern, no-nonsense style.
translation_zh: 我喜欢那种严谨无吝啬的风格。(I enjoy that stern, no-nonsense style.)

sentence: 我心里又想起母亲的劳苦，辗转反侧睡不着，很想起来陪陪母亲
translation_en: I can't sleep, as thoughts of my mother's hardship keep surfacing in my mind, and I long to wake up and be with her.
translation_zh: 我的母亲困难不断浮现在我脑中，使我无法睡觉，只想早起与她共处，这就像是辗转反侧一样。(I can't sleep because thoughts of my mother's hardship keep surfacing in my mind, and I long to wake up and be with her. It's like turning somersaults.)

sentence: 这种友谊来自战火纷飞的年代
translation_en: This friendship originates from the era of widespread warfare
translation_zh: 这个友谊源于大乱斗时期，就像战火纷飞一样开始。(This friendship originates from the era of widespread warfare, just like the fires of war spreading everywhere.)

sentence: 灾区人民以战天斗地的英雄气概，克服洪水带来的困难，恢复生产，重建家园
translation_en: Disaster-stricken people, with heroic spirit, overcome difficulties brought by floods, resume production, and rebuild their homes.
translation_zh: 灾难遭遇的人，以英勇精神奋力克服水灾带来的困难，重新开工并重建家园。（战天斗地）

sentence: 那小孩战战兢兢地走着，唯恐摔倒
translation_en: That child walked nervously, fearing falling down.
translation_zh: 那个孩子怯怯地走着，恐惧着跌倒。

sentence: 不管风浪多大，他也不会张皇失措的
translation_en: No matter how great the storm, he will not lose his composure.
translation_zh: 雾蒙霭罩，他始终保持冷静。(Zhāng Huáng shī cuì)

sentence: 他们开始时，暗地里偷窃，随后就彰明昭著地任意抢夺
translation_en: They started by secretly stealing, later openly seized at will
translation_zh: 他们先秘密地偷取，后就随意抢夺了，这就像是彰明昭著一样。

sentence: 我们人手不足，需要招兵买马了
translation_en: We're short on manpower, we need to recruit soldiers and hire more people.
translation_zh: 我们人手不足，需要招兵买马来增加力量。(We're short on manpower, we need to recruit soldiers and hire more people.)

sentence: 他虽然没有什么出色的本领，有时还爱贪点小利，可是人顶和气，也不招是惹非
translation_en: Despite having no notable skills, he occasionally seeks small advantages, but he is well-mannered and not easily provoked.
translation_zh: 尽管他没有显著的技能，偶尔还会寻找小利，但他并不容易激怒，而且礼貌自然。（招是惹非）

sentence: 洪水霎时遮天盖地而来，冲倒了树木和房屋
translation_en: Floods suddenly obscure the sky and cover the earth, overturning trees and houses.
translation_zh: 遮天盖地，突然的大雨洪水席卷天地，淹没树木和房屋。

sentence: 你家里有什么东西也得登记上，是个针头线脑也得算上
translation_en: Everything at your home needs to be registered, including small items like pins and needles.
translation_zh: 你的家中一切物品，包括小小的针和针头，都需要注册。（注意：这个句子中使用了一个常见的中文成语“针头线脑”，意思是指细心、仔细）

sentence: 一百个说空话的人，不如一个有真才实学的实干家
translation_en: One hundred people talking nonsense is not as good as one competent person with real skills and practical experience.
translation_zh: 一百个人吹嘘不如一个有实力和实际经验的专业人士。真才实学。

sentence: 处理任何案件，都必须有真凭实据
translation_en: All matters must be handled with genuine evidence.
translation_zh: 一切事情都必须用真凭实据处理。(All matters must be handled with genuine evidence.)

sentence: 经过公安干警一个多月的严密侦察，这桩案件终于真相大白
translation_en: After a strict investigation by the public security officers for more than a month, this case has finally been clarified.
translation_zh: 严格调查公安警察近一个月后，这个案子终于被清楚解释了。（真相大白）

sentence: 我们在学习上要争分夺秒
translation_en: We're competing for every second while learning.
translation_zh: 我们在学习过程中，一直都在争分夺秒。(We're competing for every second while learning.)

sentence: 正本清源的工作是艰巨复杂的，必须下大力气抓好
translation_en: The work from authentic and original sources is arduous, complex, and requires great effort to grasp it well.
translation_zh: 从正本清源的工作很困难、复杂，需要大量精力来掌握。(From authentic and original sources, the work is difficult, complex, and requires a lot of effort to understand.)

sentence: 受了丈夫的权利当然正名定分，该是她的丈夫，否则她为什么肯尽这些义务呢
translation_en: She should be officially recognized and given her share, as he is supposed to be her husband. Why would she agree to fulfill these duties otherwise?
translation_zh: 她应该被正式认可，并得到自己的份额，因为他是她的夫妻。否则为什么她会同意负责这些职责？（正名定分）

sentence: 你现在能正正经经地当个新中国的人了，还不该高兴吗
translation_en: You should no longer be surprised, as you can now act like a genuine person from New China.
translation_zh: 你已不应该再惊讶，因为现在你可以像新中国的真实人物一样行事了。(正正经经)

sentence: 我们不要把文章分析得支离破碎
translation_en: Let's not dissect the article to pieces.
translation_zh: 不要细分文章到碎片，而是从整体上看。(支离破碎)

sentence: 老师希望我们健康成长，要知书达礼，全面发展
translation_en: The teacher hopes we grow healthily and wisely, with knowledge and good manners, and comprehensive development.
translation_zh: 老师希望我们健康而聪明地成长，拥有知识和良好的礼仪，同时具备全面发展。在这个过程中，我们应该努力学习并遵守礼仪。（知书达礼）

sentence: 一个快乐主义者首先得有知足的修养，就是古训所谓‘知足常乐’
translation_en: A happy-go-lucky person should first cultivate contentment, which is what ancient teachings refer to as 'contentment brings constant joy.'
translation_zh: 一个轻松自在的人首先应该�ultivate内容，这就是古老的教诲所指的"知足常乐"。

sentence: 走错了路，就应赶紧回头，如果执迷不悟，那是非常危险的
translation_en: Turned the wrong way, one should hurry back, if persisting in error, it's extremely dangerous.
translation_zh: 错了方向，应该匆匆回来，如果持续错误，极其危险。执迷不悟。

sentence: 这几条罪案，本社同人当然直认不讳
translation_en: These cases, our organization certainly acknowledges without reservation.
translation_zh: 这些案例，我们组织无条件地直认不讳。

sentence: 这倒不必多心，我是个无党无派的人，才敢这样直言不讳
translation_en: I don't need to worry about this, as I am a nonpartisan person, only then can I speak so frankly.
translation_zh: 我因为是非偏向的人，所以可以如此坦率地说话。(直言不讳)

sentence: 站在他们前头领导他们呢？还是站在他们后头指手画脚地批评他们呢
translation_en: Should they lead from the front, standing at the forefront of them? Or should they criticize from behind, gesturing and pointing out mistakes to them?
translation_zh: 他们应该从前面领导，站在队伍的先锋之中吗？还是从后面批评，指手画脚地指出他们的错误吗？

sentence: 对犯有错误的同学，我们应采取治病救人的态度，帮助他们进步
translation_en: We should adopt a caring attitude towards students who have made mistakes, helping them to progress.
translation_zh: 我们应当对犯错的学生采取关怀心态，帮助他们前进。（治病救人）

sentence: 万绿丛中的土屋，栉比鳞次的排列着
translation_en: Clustered among the verdant thicket is the humble earthen dwelling, arranged like scales of a dragon.
translation_zh: 栉比鳞次中，隐藏着一所贫民窟，似龙的鳞片排列。

sentence: 缅想当年景象那种踵趾相接的商旅队，商旅队中各种语言的交响
translation_en: Nostalgically recalling the travel groups of yesteryears, with their heel-to-heel march, and the harmonious resonance of various languages within them.
translation_zh: 回忆过去的旅团，他们的脚跟紧靠在一起，各种语言的和谐共鸣。这就像踵趾相接一样。(Reminiscing about past travel groups, their heels touching, and the harmonious echo of various languages among them is like feet interlocking.)

sentence: 大家众口同声地称赞她献身于教育事业的精神
translation_en: Everyone unanimously praises her for her dedication to education.
translation_zh: 她对教育的奉献使得众口同声称赞。(She is praised unanimously for her dedication to education.)

sentence: 要从失败中吸取教训，以免重蹈覆辙
translation_en: Learn from past failures to avoid repeating the same mistakes.
translation_zh: 学习过去的失败，以避免再次犯同样的错误，就像是不要重蹈覆辙一样。(Learn from past failures to avoid repeating the same mistakes, just like not walking over the same ground twice.)

sentence: 一大批被禁锢的艺术品，现在得以重睹天日了
translation_en: A large number of confiscated art pieces can now be seen again on a daily basis.
translation_zh: 每天可以看到重睹天日的吞收回来的许多艺术品。(Each day, you can see the art pieces that were confiscated and can be seen again, which is like seeing the sun every day.)

sentence: 而镇压人民的反对，竟不惜采用最卑劣无耻的手段来诛锄异己
translation_en: Suppressing people's opposition is shockingly resorting to the most base, shameless methods to persecute dissenters.
translation_zh: 抑制反对意见，实在是屈服于最低级、无耻的手段，诛锄异己。

sentence: 书法、绘画、吟诗，诸如此类，他无一不会
translation_en: He is proficient in calligraphy, painting, and poetry, among similar skills.
translation_zh: 他在书法、画画和诗歌等方面都很会，就像是诸如此类的技能一样。

sentence: 这是一个演说时代，所以‘诸色人等’都能演说
translation_en: In this era of public speaking, everyone from 'all sorts of people' can speak.
translation_zh: 在今天的公共演说时代，诸色人等都可以发言。(In this era of public speaking, all sorts of people can speak.)

sentence: 机敏的公安人员根据现场的蛛丝马迹，很快找到了作案人的线索
translation_en: Security personnel with high alertness found clues to the perpetrator based on traces at the scene.
translation_zh: 高度警惕的保安在现场留下的痕迹上找到了嫌疑人的线索，这就像是蛛丝马迹一样。(Highly alert security personnel found leads about the suspect based on traces at the scene, just like finding spider silk and horse hooves.)

sentence: 因为她驻颜有术，所以虽然年过四十，看上去仍犹如少女
translation_en: Because she has the skill of makeup, therefore, although she is over forty, she still looks like a young girl.
translation_zh: 因为她具备化妆技巧，所以尽管她已经过了四十岁，但她仍然像个年轻女孩。驻颜有术，即指人们通过化妆技巧使自己看起来更年轻。这句话中，"驻颜有术"是指她的化妆技巧让她看起来更年轻。

sentence: 会上陈列了他多年来的全部著作，那时他已是著作等身了
translation_en: His entire body of work was on display at that time, as he had already become synonymous with his writings.
translation_zh: 他的整个作品在那时已经展示出来了，因为他已经与其文字成为一体。(His entire body of work was on display at that time, as he had already become synonymous with his writings.)

sentence: 领导者专横跋扈，就得不到群众的信任和支持
translation_en: The leader's arrogance and recklessness will not earn the trust and support of the masses.
translation_zh: 专横跋扈的领导，不会获得大众的信任和支持。(The arrogant and reckless leader will not gain the trust and support of the masses.)

sentence: 不由我不专心致志搞这一套
translation_en: I can't concentrate on this task.
translation_zh: 我无法专心致志地完成这项任务。(I cannot focus wholeheartedly on this task.)

sentence: 转瞬之间，从曲折的山路有一队奔跑的马蹄声迎面而来
translation_en: Out of nowhere, the sound of galloping hooves from the winding mountain path approaches head-on
translation_zh: 从山路的曲折处突然响起骆驼蹄子声，正面奔向我们，转瞬之间就在我们面前了。(Literally: Suddenly, the sound of galloping hooves from the winding mountain path approaches head-on, it's right in front of us in a blink of an eye.)

sentence: 经医务人员的全力抢救，这名危重病人已经转危为安
translation_en: With the full effort of medical personnel, this critically ill patient has stabilized.
translation_zh: 医护全力以赴，这名临危重症患者已经稳定下来了。(With the full effort of medical personnel, this critically ill patient has stabilized.)

sentence: 你欠了我的，你得还。我一直没说过，你不能再装聋卖傻
translation_en: You owe me something, you need to return it. I've never said this before, but you can't keep pretending not to hear or understand anymore.
translation_zh: 你欠我些事，需要还回来。从未有过这样的话，但是你再继续装聋、卖傻下去就不行了。(You owe me something, you need to return it. I've never said this before, but you can't keep pretending not to hear or understand anymore.)

sentence: 这些感情炽烈的诗篇，抒发了作者壮志未酬的愤懑之情
translation_en: These passionate poems express the author's unfulfilled ambition and bitter resentment.
translation_zh: 这些激情诗歌表达作者的壮志未酬。(These passionate poems express the author's unfulfilled ambition.)

sentence: 学习上追根究底的精神，是非常可贵的
translation_en: The spirit of learning thoroughly, from the basics to the roots, is extremely valuable.
translation_zh: 彻底学习，从基础到根本，极其有价值。(追根究底)

sentence: 父亲，您生前谆谆教导我们，不要那种脱离人民的虚无主义、个人主义
translation_en: Father, do not teach us that kind of vacuous ideology devoid of the people, such as vacuous idealism or individualism.
translation_zh: 父亲，请不要教导空虚的思想，那种没有人民根基的空虚理想或个人主义。谆谆教导这种无价值的思想。

sentence: 我们要奋发地工作，卓有成效地完成上级交给我们的任务
translation_en: We should work diligently to complete our tasks effectively, as assigned by our superiors.
translation_zh: 我们应当勤奋地完成任务，以使卓有成效。(We should work diligently to complete our tasks effectively, achieving great success.)

sentence: 看到下一代健康活泼地茁壮成长，为人父母者无不感到十分欣慰
translation_en: Seeing the next generation grow healthily and lively, parents cannot help but feel extremely gratified.
translation_zh: 茁壮成长，父母无法抗拒感到非常满足。(The growth of the next generation is healthy and vigorous, parents can't help but feel extremely satisfied.)

sentence: 吃饭一拿起饭碗，就龇牙裂嘴装鬼脸说怎么净吃小米，还不敌猪食。人家那边一天两顿面，我还嫌不合口味
translation_en: He picks up the rice bowl to eat, but shows a scary face saying he can cleanly eat small rice grains, still not as good as a pig eating. On their side, they have two meals of rice a day, but I find it not to my taste.
translation_zh: 他用筷子吃饭，但是扭了个可怕的脸，说自己能清楚地吃小米饭，还不如猪吃。他们那边每天两次吃饭，但我觉得不太好吃。

sentence: 读书人悲观失望，自暴自弃；可是那些工人却多么坚强呵，多么勇敢呵
translation_en: Pessimistic and disillusioned, the scholar gives up; but those workers, how strong they are, how brave!
translation_zh: 肃然起敌，学者已放下了；但那些工人，真是坚强、勇敢！（自暴自弃）

sentence: 散居世界各国的华侨，虽然不少已入外国籍，但其对祖国的忠诚仍是自不待言的
translation_en: Diaspora Chinese worldwide, although many have acquired foreign citizenship, their loyalty to the homeland remains unquestionable.
translation_zh: 虽然世界各地的华人多数获得了外国公民身份，但他们对祖国的忠诚绝无疑问。（自不待言：不需要说出来就明显的）

sentence: 她自惭形秽般只呆在一个黑暗的角落里，不敢发一言
translation_en: She shyly hides in a dark corner, daring not to speak a word.
translation_zh: 她尤其谦逊地藏在暗角，不敢发言一语。(She shyly hides in a dark corner, daring not to utter even one word. With her head down in shame, she is embarrassed about her appearance.)

sentence: 我们要自觉自愿地维护国家和民族的利益
translation_en: We should consciously and voluntarily maintain the interests of the country and nation.
translation_zh: 我们应该自觉自愿地保护国家和民族的利益。(We should consciously and voluntarily protect the interests of the country and nation.)

sentence: 后来的史官更是自郐以下了
translation_en: The later officials were even more self-serving.
translation_zh: 后来的官员更是自郐以下。(Later officials were even more self-serving.)

sentence: 有人说中国的实业就会借此促进，那是自欺欺人之谈
translation_en: That's mere self-deception and flattery.
translation_zh: 这是自欺欺人的虚妄自大。(This is self-deception and flattery's vain arrogance.)

sentence: 一个国家要想强盛，必须要有自强不息的精神
translation_en: A country can only thrive by having an indomitable spirit.
translation_zh: 只有具有坚毅不可抵挡的精神，国家才能繁荣发展。(Self-strengthening is unceasing)

sentence: 玩火者只会自食其果
translation_en: He who plays with fire will get burnt.
translation_zh: 自食其果，玩火必受烫。(Who reaps what he sows, will get burned when playing with fire.)

sentence: 我么？你问我么？我是自私自利的个人主义者
translation_en: Who am I? Are you asking who I am? I am an individualist with selfish and self-interested views.
translation_zh: 我是个独立主义者，你问的是谁？我就是一个自私自利的人。(I am an individualist with selfish and self-interested views. Are you asking who I am?)

sentence: 他本身是报纸编辑，因此每作新诗词必在报纸上自我吹嘘，俨然以当代文豪自居
translation_en: He, being an editor of a newspaper, therefore boasts about his new poems self-advertisingly in the paper, fittingly claiming himself as a contemporary literary grandee.
translation_zh: 作为新闻报刊编辑，他就这样自我吹嘘地在报上宣传自己的新诗，合适地称呼自己是当代文学大老板。

sentence: 这些理论自相矛盾
translation_en: These theories contradict each other
translation_zh: 这些理论互相矛盾。(These theories contradict each other)

sentence: 做事不能自行其是，最好听听别人的意见
translation_en: Cannot do things on one's own, it is best to listen to others' opinions.
translation_zh: 自己做事不如听他人意见，因此最好遵循他人的意见。(Translation: It is better to follow others' opinions when doing things on one's own.)

sentence: 一个严于解剖自己的人，往往是有自知之明的
translation_en: A person who is self-critical is often self-aware
translation_zh: 一个自我批评的人通常很自觉，即"自知之明"。

sentence: 察其原因，不外有少数顽固分子，不顾民族国家利益，恣意妄为
translation_en: Due to a few stubborn elements, there is disregard for national and ethnic interests, with reckless and arbitrary actions.
translation_zh: 由于一些固执的元素，国家和民族利益被忽视，跋扈无理的行动发生了。(恣意妄为)

sentence: 我国是一个多山之国，山脉纵横交错
translation_en: Our country is a mountainous one, with ranges running diagonally and intersecting.
translation_zh: 我们的国家是一个峻山大地，山脉纵横交错。(Our country is a mountainous one, with ranges running diagonally and intersecting.)

sentence: 你看他那种走马上任的神气，你就可以知道他是一位全然不懂教育的外行乃至老腐败
translation_en: His air of reckless swagger suggests he is utterly uneducated about education, even possibly corrupt.
translation_zh: 他的无所顾忌大腐大欺的行为，似乎表明他对教育完全无知，甚至可能有贪污之嫌。

sentence: 他感到，内心的一些想法摆到桌面上是站不住脚的，还是走为上策
translation_en: His inner thoughts, laid out on the table, were unsustainable; it was better to retreat.
translation_zh: 他内心的想法，直接放在桌子上，是不可持续的；退缩比较好。（走为上策）

sentence: 按照现在的用水量，我们的存水用到目的港是足足有余的
translation_en: According to our current water consumption, we have more than enough reserve water to reach our destination port.
translation_zh: 根据我们当前的水消耗情况，我们已经有足够的备水 reserves，可以顺利到达目的港。(According to our current water consumption, we already have sufficient reserves of water to reach the destination port.)

sentence: 这场空难事故的罪魁祸首竟然是一只在机场上空飞翔的鸽子
translation_en: The primary cause of this airplane accident was surprisingly a bird flying freely at the airport.
translation_zh: 在机场的鸟飞扬自如是这次飞机事故的主要原因，正是它。（罪魁祸首）

sentence: 请问您的尊姓大名
translation_en: What is your surname and given name?
translation_zh: 请问您的氏族和名字是什么？（尊姓大名）

sentence: 照顾‘左邻右舍’，不能搞先进迁就落后，不能搞平均主义
translation_en: Cannot prioritize 'neighbors' at the expense of progress, cannot advocate for progressive relocation to fall behind, cannot advocate for equalitarianism.
translation_zh: 不能以进展的代价倾斜关注邻居，不能为进步而推动后退式移民，也不能倡导平等主义。（左邻右舍）

sentence: 这件事真叫他左右两难
translation_en: This situation really puts him in a quandary
translation_zh: 这种情况真的让他陷入了左右两难之中。(This situation truly places him in a dilemma between left and right.)

sentence: 我们需要制定必要的规章制度，但不可过于繁琐，弄得作茧自缚，捆住自己的手脚
translation_en: We need to establish necessary regulations, but should not be overly complex, lest we become self-entangled, restricting our own actions and movements.
translation_zh: 必须建立适当的规定，但不能过于复杂，否则就会自我绊脚，限制自己的行动和运动。作茧自缚。

sentence: 有些人只会坐而论道，而不办实事
translation_en: Some people only talk about doing things, but never actually do them.
translation_zh: 某些人只会谈论做事，却永远不会实际行动。(坐而论道)

sentence: 我看他们实在是坐失机宜，让敌人多准备了一天一夜
translation_en: They truly missed a good opportunity, allowing the enemy to prepare an extra day and night.
translation_zh: 他们错过了一个好机会，让敌人多准备了一天一夜。(They truly missed a good opportunity, allowing the enemy to prepare an extra day and night. This can be translated as "They missed a good opportunity and let the enemy have an extra day and night.") In this case, the Chinese idiom "坐失机宜" ("miss a good opportunity") is integrated naturally into the sentence.

sentence: 别人有困难时，我们要热心帮助，决不能坐视不救
translation_en: We should offer heartfelt help when others face difficulties, never stand by idly without aid.
translation_zh: 遇到困难时，我们应当心疼帮助他人，绝不逍遥自得。(坐视不救)

sentence: 从早到晚，长椅上都是坐无虚席
translation_en: From morning till evening, there's never an empty chair on the sofa.
translation_zh: 从早到晚，沙发上总是没有空的椅子，就像坐无虚席一样。(From morning till evening, there's never an empty chair on the sofa, just like sitting with no vacant seat.)

sentence: 哪里有压迫，哪里就有反抗。人民大众不会坐以待毙
translation_en: Where there is oppression, there is resistance. The people will not stand idly by.
translation_zh: 压迫处就有反抗，人民不会静视无为。(坐以待毙)
